Name: M+W Group
Description:
M+W Group with its origin in Germany and a history of more than 100 years has reorganised its activities in 2018, thereby creating two, distinct companies ‘Exyte’ and ‘M+W’:
Exyte comprises all core business activities, which include Advanced Technology Facilities (ATF), Biopharma & Life Sciences, Data Centers (DTC) and Regional Specific Business (RSB) in defined target countries.
M+W comprises all other business activities, which are mainly related to energy projects.
The re-grouping does not have any influence on the execution of ongoing projects or on customer engagements, respectively. M+W Group, which holds 100% of Exyte and 100% of M+W, is owned by the Stumpf Group.

Name: United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC)
Description:
United Microelectronics Corporation (NYSE: UMC, TWSE: 2303) is a leading global semiconductor foundry with over four decades of innovation powering everyday technologies that shape the modern world. From AI, automotive, connectivity, consumer electronics, to IoT, UMC delivers precise, high-quality integrated circuit (IC) manufacturing services to customers across every major sector of the electronics industry.

As one of the world’s most established pure-play foundries, UMC offers advanced logic and specialty technologies, including embedded high-voltage, embedded non-volatile Memory, RFSOI, and BCD combined with deep expertise and collaborative engineering partnerships.

Headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan, UMC operates a global footprint that includes manufacturing and R&D in Taiwan and Singapore, as well as fabs across China and Japan. With more than 20,000 employees worldwide, we are committed to delivering both global impact and regional excellence.

At UMC, innovation is powered by people. We enable stable, meaningful careers through best-in-class training, access to advanced technology, and a culture that values precision, progress, and teamwork. Our people-first approach ensures that every employee has the tools and support to thrive while contributing to solutions that move industries and lives forward as we precision-engineer the future.

Name: SILICON BOX
Description:
Silicon Box is an advanced semiconductor packaging company, specializing in cutting-edge integration technology and manufacturing processes. We offer solutions that enable chiplet architecture, as well as high performance alternatives to traditional packaging schemes.  Leveraging our proprietary technology, 30 years of multi-sectoral expertise, and relationships with best-in-class partners, we strive to solve the unique challenges of chiplet adoption in order to build the emergent technologies shaping the world around us today.

Silicon Box was founded in 2021 by Dr. Byung Joon (BJ) Han, Dr. Sehat Sutardja and Weili Dai.  Dr. Han is the inventor of many of the most advanced packaging solutions in today’s market, and his team at Silicon Box holds standing records for yield in advanced packaging technology at wafer level production.   Dr. Sutardja introduced the concept of chiplets at the International Solid-State Circuits Conference (ISSCC) in 2015.  He and Weili Dai founded Marvell Technology Group (NASDAQ: MRVL) in 1995, and ran the company for twenty years.

Name: SilTerra Malaysia Sdn. Bhd.
Description:
SilTerra is a project of strategic national interest to promote front-end semiconductor manufacturing and a catalyst for high technology investments in Malaysia. It was founded in November 1995 as Wafer Technology Malaysia Sdn Bhd and was renamed as SilTerra Malaysia Sdn Bhd in December 1999. 

SilTerra broke ground on its first manufacturing facility in Kulim, Malaysia in June 1999 and produced working silicon in November 2000. Since its inception, SilTerra has served many top-tier global fabless design and product companies covering the consumer electronics, communications & computing, and mobile device market segments. 

SilTerra offers CMOS design and a broad range of fabrication processes for Integrated Chips (IC) in Advanced Logic, Mixed Signal & Radio Frequency and High Voltage applications. 

The CMOS High Voltage Technology being used in the design and fabrication of Display Driver ICs (DDI), is widely used in the mobile devices market segment. This includes display drivers for mobile phones, GPS equipment, MP3/4 Personal Media Players (PMP), Digital Cameras and other similar applications. 

SilTerra provides complete design solutions for customers to create leading-edge products, optimized for its high-yielding manufacturing processes, through strategic partnerships with industry-leading Intellectual Property (IP) design library providers, Design Services and Electronic Design Automation (EDA) suppliers. SilTerra also offers comprehensive in-house Failure Analysis (FA) services to high-tech companies and universities, performing detailed construction and failure analysis of nano-scale structures.

Name: Codasip
Description:
Codasip is a processor solutions company which helps developers to differentiate their products. We are Europe’s leading RISC-V company with a global presence. Billions of chips already use our technology.

In today’s technology market, differentiation is everything. The difference between success and failure. And, in chip design, this difference is quite literally wafer thin. With increasing transistor costs, your developers can no longer rely on semiconductor scaling and legacy processors to achieve your goals. The only way forward is to implement custom compute with designs tailored to your applications.

We deliver custom compute through the combination of the open RISC-V ISA, Codasip Studio processor design automation and high-quality processor IP. Our innovative approach lets you easily customize and differentiate your designs. You can develop high-performing, and game-changing products that are truly transformational.

Founding member of RISC-V International.
Founding member of the CHERI Alliance.

Name: Diodes Incorporated
Description:
For information about career opportunities please visit www.diodes.com/careers

Diodes Incorporated is a leading global manufacturer and supplier of high-quality semiconductor products to the world’s leading companies in the automotive, industrial, computing, consumer electronics, and communications markets. We leverage our expanded product portfolio of discrete, analog, and mixed-signal products and leading-edge packaging technology to meet customers’ needs. Our broad range of application-specific solutions and solutions-focused sales, coupled with worldwide operations of 32 sites, including engineering, testing, manufacturing, and customer service, enables us to be a premier provider for high-volume, high-growth markets. 

Our products include diodes; rectifiers; transistors; MOSFETs; GPP bridges; GPP rectifiers; protection devices; function-specific arrays; single gate logic; amplifiers and comparators; Hall-effect and temperature sensors; power management devices, including AC-DC converters and controllers, DC-DC switching and linear voltage regulators, voltage references, and LED drivers; along with special-function devices, such as USB power switches, load switches, voltage supervisors, and motor controllers. Diodes also has timing, connectivity, switching, and signal integrity solutions for high-speed signals.

Our product focus is on high-growth end-user equipment markets, such as satellite TV set-top boxes, portable DVD players, datacom devices, ADSL modems, power supplies, medical devices (non-life support devices/systems), PCs and notebooks, flat panel displays, digital cameras, mobile handsets, AC-to-DC and DC-to-DC conversion, Wireless 802.11 LAN access points, brushless DC motor fans, serial connectivity, and automotive applications.

Diodes’ global corporate headquarters is located in Plano, Texas, USA. 

For more information visit www.Diodes.com.

Name: CAE
Description:
CAE is a global physical commodities trading firm addressing the semiconductor market.  Initially focused on silicon, CAE considers transactions in any physical asset utilized by a fabrication facility. We work with all levels of a fab, from maintenance engineers to fab managers to understand their demand, available supply, and solve fundamental sourcing and monetization challenges.

CAE enters commodity markets tied to attractive secular trends, but are fragmented and lack central pricing mechanisms, settlement systems, and are without developed derivatives. CAE’s platform then congregates buyer and seller inputs into one algorithmic matching system that looks to behavior, market events, supply, demand, and asset quality to develop solutions for its clients.

CAE’s advantages are its track record for reliable outcomes, driven people, rigorous and rapid execution, deep network, unique data aggregation, analytics, and its proprietary technology platform. CAE’s technology allows it to rapidly manage hundreds of thousands of relationships, thousands of client interactions per day, and capture hundreds of thousands of data points per month.

CAE provides its clients with unique access to off-market situations, superior pricing, better access to information in competitive situations, and a safe platform to purchase or sell through that mitigates asset, funding, counterparty, and competitive risk.

CAE was founded in 1982 in Menlo Park, CA. CAE is based in Austin, TX, and has offices across the U.S. CAE’s non-U.S. offices are in Switzerland, Hungary, Belarus, Taiwan, Korea, Japan, Singapore, and Malaysia.

CAE is always looking for talented, educated, and passionate individuals to join our growing team! If you want to work in a fast-paced environment for a rapidly growing company, we invite you to check out our current openings. 
 
http://caeonline.com/careers

With decades of accumulated manufacturing excellence and process innovation, SIMMTECH supplies the world’s most advanced PCBs to top-tier semiconductor companies. Our core product portfolio includes module PCBs for memory expansion and semiconductor substrates for chip assembly and packaging.

SIMMTECH is the only company in the industry with a global manufacturing footprint spanning four countries—South Korea, Japan, China, and Malaysia. This unique network allows us to deliver exceptional supply chain flexibility, regional responsiveness, and consistent quality to our global customers.

At the heart of SIMMTECH is our unwavering commitment to Integrity—a value that goes beyond honesty to encompass the fulfillment of every promise we make. Guided by this principle, every member of SIMMTECH is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of innovation and enabling a better world through advanced PCB technology.

Manufacturers, academic and governmental institutions depend on Plasma-Therm equipment, designed with “lab-to-fab” flexibility to meet the requirements of both R&D and volume production.

Name: Semibot, Inc.
Description:
Semibot is based in Silicon Valley with its main office in Santa Clara. In addition to our facility, we offer field service to our customers in order to minimize the maintenance turn-around time.

Semibot is dedicated to improvement in different design, diagnostic and testing techniques when it comes to robot equipment repair, refurbishment and replacement. We developed continuously improving standards for diagnostics and testing in order to make sure that our customer's equipment leaves our facilities in the best shape. Our staff is certified in servicing different equipment brands and we provide longest service guarantee in the industry. Semibot's services include repair, refurbishment, replacement and design of different wafer handler equipment regardless of the industry.

Repairs:
Semibot offers complete repair services for semiconductor robots, pre-aligners, indexers and tracks, robot arm tooling, including automatic tool changers, multi-axis force/torque sensing systems, robotic deburring tools, robotic collision sensors, rotary joints, and compliance devices. Potential problems are identified before a failure occurs and each unit is thoroughly tested. 

Semibot specializes in Equipe/PRI/Brooks, Genmark, MECS and Cybeq as well as other prevalent brands.


Refurbishment:
Semibot refurbishing restores your older equipment back to original factory specifications, extending its life and asset value.

Refurbishing can include retrofitting or upgrading, taking advantage of current technological advances. Any engineering enhancements, new software releases or upgrades which have been developed since the equipment was introduced can also be added, to create a refurbished robot with up-to-date functionality.

All Semibot refurbished robots and components are certified to current safety standards and covered by a warranty.

For more information, please refer to the company website.

Description:
CMIt 政美應用股份有限公司成立於1995年，初期以高端量測設備銷售代理為主要營業項目，政美應用于2010年開啟在高精度自動檢測、量測領域的自主研究與發展。 

政美應用透過自行開發的可擴充模組化軟體平台，結合自有光學影像及光路設計技術，整合出優異的自動化2D/3D檢測、量測性能機台，應用在先進封裝、MicroLED、化合物半導體等主要製程領域。其中，先進封裝重新佈線(RDL)、矽中介層(Interposer)的關鍵製程，更是我們所專精的量檢測環節。 

多年來政美應用在單一賽道上不斷前進，積累200家以上的客戶，數十項專利技術。由於高速運算的需求急速成長，市場勢必對於自動化、高精度的檢/量測設備需求進一步放大，未來我們將繼續和國內外一線的客戶夥伴攜手，擴大既有的合作生態，與產業趨勢緊密對接，朝著更複雜、更高端的前沿技術能力挺進，為我們引以為傲的半導體產業貢獻一份心力。 

CMIt Cheng Mei Instrument Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995. Initially, its primary business was the sales and distribution of high-end measurement equipment. In 2010, CMIt  began independent research and development in the fields of high-precision automated inspection and metrology. 

By leveraging its proprietary scalable modular software platform and incorporating proprietary optical imaging and optical path design technologies, CMIt  has developed superior automated 2D/3D inspection and metrology systems equipment for applications in key manufacturing processes such as advanced packaging, MicroLED and compound semiconductors. Among them, the critical RDL and interposer processes in advanced packaging are measurement and inspectional areas in which we specialize. 

For many years, CMIt  has continuously advanced in a single field, accumulating over 200 customers and dozens of patented technologies. As the demand for high-speed computing rapidly grows, the market demand for automated, high-precision inspection and metrology equipment will inevitably increase. In the future, we will continue to collaborate with leading domestic and international customer partners, expand our existing collaborative ecosystem, closely align with industry trends, and move towards more complex and advanced cutting-edge technological capabilities, contributing to the semiconductor industry, for which we are so proud of.

Description:
Nano3D Systems provides electrochemical metallization solutions for high tech applications.  Use our proprietary high-resolution atypical photoresist or our electroless plating solutions for conformal plating of 3D features and electroplating solutions for rapid plating of fine features or to fill high-aspect-ratio blind vias or through-holes. 

Reduce costs by replacing vapor deposition with conformal electroless plating in nickel, cobalt, or copper; fill deep voids or build bumps and pads using high-speed electroplated copper.  Fight substrate-metal coefficient of thermal expansion (CTE) mismatch with tunable nickel-iron alloys, including ultra-low CTE Invar.  

Nano3D Systems' eLOCOS(TM) electrodeposition technology can also be applied to: selective metallization of microstructures, direct-writing of metals onto flexible materials, HDI fabrication, in-house prototyping of micron scale features, plating of nanoparticles and microparticles in regular or irregular shapes.

Nano3D Systems is an Oregon Nanoscience and Microtechnology Institute (ONAMI) portfolio company, with facilities in Corvallis, OR., and resources at nearby universities.  Nano3D Systems can assist in determining a plating process that will work for your project, from substrate prep to plating.  Solutions are readily tailored to your needs, even unusual materials such as indium, metal carbon-nanotube composites, and many other materials not readily available for purchase.

For small batch orders of some of our more popular solutions, visit our online store at www.nano3dsystems.com.  For larger quantities, specialty solutions, or R&D services, contact us through the website or at info@nano3dsystems.com

Name: Engim
Description:
Analysts forecast that the Wireless LAN market will grow from 8 million users in 2002 to 80 million users by 2007. This explosive rate of WLAN adoption is driving the need for high capacity WLAN infrastructure within the enterprise. Additionally, as enterprise deployments continue to grow, IT Managers need WLAN infrastructure products that offer enhanced functional capabilities to reduce deployment complexity, increase network robustness and reduce operational costs.

Todays WLAN silicon is optimized for client applications and not for high capacity WLAN infrastructure applications. By allowing simultaneous communications on all WLAN channels, Engims Multi-Channel WLAN Switching Engine chipset enables a new generation of very high performance, cost-effective access points. These chipsets apply Wideband Spectral Processing to standards-based WLAN infrastructure products for the first time, thereby dramatically increasing bandwidth and data throughput and making a whole new range of features and functionality available to users at low cost.

Name: Turing Micro
Description:
Our patented innovations in processing architecture have solved problems beneficial to AR/VR, robotics and many other applications requiring streaming data at a high throughput in real-time.  We call it "IRDA": Instant Reconfigurable Distributed Array. It can replace GPU and FPGA with benefits not found in either. 

This architecture is dynamically reconfigurable, with the ability to remap itself in a single clock cycle.  IRDA provides valuable energy savings over GPUs, FPGAs and ASICs.  

We provide flexibility without burdening the developer with complexity.  This architecture is designed for rapid development by allowing the developer to focus on the algorithm, not the hoop-jumping of the platform responsible for setting up the processing of the algorithm.

Applications include Robotics, Drones, Autonomous Vehicles, Artificial Intelligence, Video Streaming, Super-Computing, Mobile and 5G.

Additional features include:
- Development platform focused on the popular C language
- Massively distributed throughput
- Wafer-scalable cookie-cutter cores
- Auto mapping and routing
- Cyber Security/Masking via Layer Hopping
- Full or partial dynamic reconfigurability
- In-Chip variable power optimization
- Multi-layer virtual compute from 2D manufacturing

Learn more about IRDA here: http://turingmicro.com/IRDA.html

Name: FinScale
Description:
Inventors of the Quantum FinFET, also known as qFinFET, FinScale Inc. helps semiconductor manufacturers build faster, tighter, cooler, less expensive and more reliable chips by providing 3D device and process integration technologies that revive Moore's Law.

For manufacturers already manufacturing finFET technologies, qFinFET technology enables significant improvements in performance, density, power, cost and reliability. FinScale's qFinFET technology  also helps planar MOSFET manufacturers make the move to 3D at their existing node.

Beginning with the end in mind, FinScale’s founders set out to design the last MOSFET of the Silicon Era, based on their deep understanding of quantum limits in nanoscale materials, MOSFET device engineering and semiconductor manufacturing process technologies. After two years of focused research and development, their breakthrough inventions can now be implemented in existing and future wafer fabs to deliver compelling improvements in performance, die size, power, and cost.

For more information on FinScale and qFinFET technology please visit www.finscale.com.

Name: Semitrex
Description:
Semitrex is a new breed of power semiconductor company enjoying successes in energy-efficient digital power solutions. At a time when worldwide energy shortages are a reality and strict new efficiency standards are being enacted globally, Semitrex is creating impactful, revolutionary energy-efficient power conversion products that are friendly to humans and the environment.  

The first real power supply breakthrough in over four decades, Semitrex’s core energy efficiency power supply technology improves the way that power conversions are made in order to create a significant increase in power efficiency and reduce grid stress. The highly energy-efficient TRONIUM is Semitrex’s first chip and is based on its patented Muxcapacitor technology. TRONIUM has been tested with efficiencies over 90 percent across all load ranges (down to 50 milliamps) with only 1/2 milliwatt of standby power draw in the U.S. and one milliwatt of standby power draw in Europe. Standby power (also known as vampire power) is responsible for about 400 terawatts per year across 10 billion to 12 billion devices – losses which Semitrex virtually eliminates. Semitrex uses its Muxcapacitor capacitive voltage conversions as the primary method of voltage reduction rather than traditional topologies, which rely on inductive parts for voltage conversions. 

Applications addressed by Semitrex’s power conversion technology include the billions of devices in the consumer, computer, telecom, medical and industrial markets.

Name: smarttimer
Description:
Improve timing by applying common techniques for reducing clock skew.
The following techniques cover the most common scenarios:

* Avoid timing paths between cascaded clock buffers by eliminating unnecessary buffers or connecting them in parallel.

* Remove LUTs or any combinatorial logic in clock paths as they make clock delays and clock skew unpredictable during placement, resulting in lower quality of results. Also, a portion of the clock path is routed with general interconnect resources which are more sensitive to noise than global clocking resources. Combinatorial logic usually comes from sub-optimal clock gating conversion and can usually be moved to the clock enable logic, either connected to the clock buffer or to the sequential cells.

* Combine parallel clock buffers into a single clock buffer and connect any clock buffer clock enable logic to the corresponding sequential cell enable pins. When both rising and falling clock edges are used by the downstream logic or when power is an important factor, this technique might not be applicable.

* Apply useful skew up to 20 register level. If some of the clocks are divided by the buffer's built-in divider, implement the equivalent division with clock enable logic and apply multicycle path timing exceptions as needed.

Name: CrossFire Technologies, Inc.
Description:
CrossFire Technologies INC, a Silicon Catalyst Portfolio Company,  is enabling the Open Chiplet Economy with its Chiplet Design Suite.  

While Chiplets  are becoming ubiquitous in AI SoC design, Chiplet adoption rates in other segments are constrained by several pain points.  These include the unavailability of SoC building block Chiplets, Die to Die (D2D) interfaces that add too much cost, die area, and development time to Chiplet design, and the requirement for either costly and difficult to access Interposers or Ultra High-Density Package Substrates to integrate Chiplets into a unified MicroChip.

In response, CrossFire offers a holistic Chiplet Design Suite to address these pain points. 

The CrossFire Direct Chiplet Interface (DCI) is 10x - 50x smaller, uses 10x less power, and can shave 6 - 12 months off of a project's development schedule due to its simplicity compared to other Die to Die Interface offerings.    

Bridgelets are ready to use system interface functions such as Memory Controllers, System Component Interfaces, and Network Interfaces that include CrossFire's DCI Die to Die Interface.  Bridgelets are available via the Open Chiplet Marketplace and available to all to integrate into their Chiplet based systems.   

Pulling it all together, CrossFire offers OmniDie, a unique approach to chiplet integration that does not require interposers or a costly High-Density package Substrates.  With OmniDie, customers avoid interposer availability constraints and other expensive alternatives, saving development time and money.

CrossFire is a privately held fabless semiconductor company with executive offices located in the Minneapolis / St. Paul area of Minnesota and a satellite office in the Research Triangle Park area of North Carolina

코아시아 그룹은 대만 상장사 이자 범중화권의 삼성전자 25년 공식 파트너사인 ‘CoAsia Electronics’ 와 시스템 반도체 디자인 솔루션 전문 기업 ‘CoAsia SEMI’, SoC(System on Chip) 전문 기업 ‘CoAsia NEXELL’, 시스템 반도체 지적재산권(IP) 전략적 투자기업 'C&CI Partners’를 주요 계열사로 두고 있습니다. IT부품 제조 관련 주요 계열사로는 삼성전자 카메라 모듈 1차사인 ‘CoAsia CM VINA’, 광학렌즈 전문 기업 ‘CoAsia Optics‘, LED전문 생산 법인 ‘CoAsia ITSWELL VINA’가 있습니다.

코아시아 그룹의 계열사들은 각 산업에서 가장 신뢰할 수 있는 파트너가 되기 위해 항상 최선을 다하고 있으며, 각 산업 생태계에서의 상생협력과 동반성장을 이루어 나가기 위해 끊임 없는 혁신으로 새로운 고객을 창출하고 새로운 시장의 기회를 선점하기 위해 노력할 것 입니다.

Name: Nidec Genmark Automation
Description:
Nidec Genmark is a worldwide leader in factory automation for semiconductor fabs, EFEM solutions, and motion control systems for the semiconductor, flat panel, solar, LED, data storage and associated industries.

Founded as Genmark Automation in 1989,the company has since grown into a global leading OEM supplier of atmospheric and vacuum transfer robots and peripheral equipment. In addition to designing, developing and manufacturing high precision robotics, motion control and integrated tool automation solutions, we combine decades of engineering expertise with an appetite for innovation, to create custom solutions for the global semiconductor, data storage and flat panel display industries.

The company’s products are designed to optimize equipment and factory productivity. Our solutions include complete automated wafer transfer systems and integration software, offering high-performance and reliability for OEM process tool manufacturers, allowing them to focus on developing next-generation process technology. Nidec Genmark Automation distributes and supports our products through a global sales and support infrastructure operating out of offices in the USA, Germany, Japan, Taiwan and China.

Name: WARDE TECHNOLOGY SINGAPORE PTE LTD
Description:
Our headquarter and factory is located in Hsinchu City, Taiwan ( R.O.C ) near the major Semiconductor Industrial Park. Our Company manufacture parts for both 200mm and 300mm Semiconductor Fabrication Plants and have been supporting to Semiconductor companies in Singapore, Malaysia, USA, Taiwan China, Europe and Japan for more than 10 years. Our main products are CMP Polishing and Cleaner parts such as Head Rebuilt parts, Consumable Parts and machine equipment parts.

Over the past 10 years, we have built confidence with our customers in terms of consumables parts, especially for High Performance Plastics and Rubber products in terms of quality and competitive pricing. We have also move from supporting CMP modules to other areas,  such as CVD ( NOVELLUS ), PVD, Etch and Implantation for other parts overhaul services and consumable parts.

We also provide Overhaul Services for RF components, such as RPS, Matchers, Generators, Microwave and Motors Drivers; also some Novellus 300mm overhaul parts for Vector, Altus, Gamma, Sabre such as IREPD, Controllers and Motors mechanical components.

Name: Morton Photonics Incorporated
Description:
Morton Photonics develops advanced photonic component and sub-system technologies for RF Photonics and sensing systems, plus applications of these technologies in FMCW LiDAR, 5G MMW Beamforming, future datacenter, datacom and optical fiber communications systems.  Our focus is on Photonic Integration on the Silicon Photonics Platform, including heterogeneous integration of additional materials to provide the high performance required by advanced analog commercial and DoD systems.

Morton Photonics designs integrated photonic components though simulation and measurements of fabricated devices tested in our photonics labs.  We work with partners for device fabrication, manufacturing partners to commercialize the photonic devices, and with system companies / Prime contractors to transition the technologies to DoD and commercial platforms.

Name: VYUsync Design Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
VYUsync Design Solutions is a product engineering company delivering intellectual property cores and hardware platforms in the high definition video processing domain. With extensive expertise built over a decade, VYUsync today offers a wide range of HEVC/H.265, AVC/H.264, MPEG-2 and peripheral IP cores for broadcast quality  applications. VYUsync is now recognized as a preferred vendor by leaders in the broadcasting industry for its highly optimized IP cores delivering unparalleled performance. 

VYUsync leverages its IP portfolio to develop custom hardware platform designed to meet the most demanding applications. The modules are available both as stand alone units & proof of concepts platforms enabling our customers to minimum risk & reduce their time to market. 

Every one of our offerings allows for a great deal of customizability enabling our customers to tailor them to their requirements.

Name: Orthogonal, Inc.
Description: Orthogonal is advancing the field of display manufacturing by lifting the constraints of traditional photolithography. Orthogonal’s proprietary photoresist system allows the direct patterning of a wide range of organic electronic materials for high resolution AMOLED and flexible display applications. Orthogonal's Photoresist chemicals, and process, replace Fine Metal Mask (FMM), enabling much higher resolutions FMM is incapable of achieving; for example: 3000ppi and beyond.

Name: VPT Components
Description:
VPT Components was formed as a collaboration between VPT Inc., a global leader in power conversion solutions, and SST Components, Inc., a MIL-PRF-19500 JANS certified semiconductor manufacturer. VPT Components is now one of the largest providers of JAN certified semiconductors along with a full-service facility for the independent, unbiased testing and custom assembly of electronic components.

VPT Components acquired the assets of MACOM’s Hi-Rel Components business (formerly Aeroflex Metelics) located in Lawrence, MA in Sepember 2018 and we are committed to supporting the former MACOM slash sheet qualifications as previously listed on the QML. This acquisition provides us with an additional 40,000 square feet of state of the art manufacturing and test capability of high reliability discrete semiconductors as we grow our product portfolio.

We are also maintaining our Billerica, MA operations with 10,000 total square feet and 4,500 square feet of class 10,000 cleanroom for discrete/hybrid assembly. Our Billerica operation includes the addition of $5M in new test, assembly, and screening equipment that enables us to assemble a wide variety of hermetically sealed components to the highest quality levels. VPT Components keeps pace with advancing technology by continually adding new and increasingly sophisticated automatic test and assembly capabilities.
Our expanding product portfolio includes MIL-PRF-19500 qualified Rad Hard NPN and PNP small signal and power switching transistors, SCRs, and MOSFETs along with an extensive offering of Zeners, rectifiers, switching diodes and Schottky products including JANHC and JANKC qualified die. Custom products and packaging services are also available.

Our name “Silicon Light Machines” reflects the core technologies embodied in the Grating Light Valve: Silicon to highlight the robust material set, Light to describe the field of use and Machines to underscore the mechanical nature of the GLV.

Name: SiEPIC Kits
Description:
[inactive] 

SiEPIC Kits is a Vancouver-based silicon-electronic photonic integrated circuits (SiEPICs) design house. 

By utilizing a combination of rapid prototyping EBeam fabrication process, commercial CMOS-compatible DUV lithography processes, combined with our electro-optical testing and packaging resources; SiEPIC Kits will enable access to silicon photonics technology solutions to businesses and researchers.

With a team of photonic engineers, SiEPIC Kits walks you through a complete design and test cycle of your photonic integrated circuit (PIC), using open-access tools and PDKs, to turn your ideas into functional prototypes. 

* Development and maintenance of Process Development Kits (PDKs) for your fabrication process. We enable foundry PDKs through the SiEPIC-Tools PDK Framework, an easy-to-use, user-friendly interface that is intended for designers of any level of experience. Enabling co-integration with advanced simulation tools.

* Design consultation and chip layout of your PIC prototype. Electro-optical testing of the fabricated prototypes is also done in-house.

* Packaging of the designed prototypes, either through in-house resources or by collaborating with third-party partners.

* Fabrication send-off of the designed prototypes. Including MPW aggregation services for public users.

Name: Advanced Linear Devices, Inc
Description:
Advanced Linear Devices, Inc. designs, develops and manufactures precision CMOS analog integrated circuits for OEMs in a broad spectrum of industries, including industrial control, computer, instrumentation, automotive, and telecom.

Products that ALD offers include: ultra-low VOS @ ultra low input bias rail-to-rail CMOS operational amplifiers, ultra-low charge injection low voltage analog switches, precision CMOS voltage comparators with high output current drivers, ultra low signal power EPAD voltage comparators, low drift CMOS timers with high discharge output, precision matched pair small signal N-channel or P-channel MOSFET arrays and EPAD MOSFETs.

ALD also offers dual slope integrating analog processors, digital voltmeter chipsets, and a line of ±5 1/2 digit DVM (digital voltmeter) boards. Many products incorporate EPAD (Electrically Programmable Analog Devices) technology for in-circuit trimming of offset and threshold voltages.

Name: Gigle Networks
Description:
About Gigle Networks: Plug into the Fun 
Gigle Networks provides system-on-chip integrated circuits and complete system solutions for multimedia home networking that can extend wired and wireless Ethernet everywhere in the home - without the need for new wires. Targeted for applications such as Internet Protocol television (IPTV), broadband TV (BBTV), video on demand (VoD), and voice over IP (VoIP), Gigle Networks' products offer superior performance, coverage and QoS as compared to alternative communication technologies, and are designed to be easily integrated into consumer electronics and IT products. Gigle Networks is a strong supporter of open standards, a board member of the HomePlug Powerline Alliance, and an active participant in IEEE P1901 and ITU-T G.hn wireline standardization initiatives. Gigle Networks has offices in Redwood City, Calif., Barcelona, Spain, and Edinburgh, UK.

Name: PGC Consultancy
Description:
PGC Consultancy is dedicated to the rapidly expanding silicon carbide sector. As this leading wide bandgap material begins to threaten silicon’s dominance of the power electronics market, PGC can provide the specialist expertise your company will need in order to master this fast-evolving market. The team who founded PGC in 2020 have expertise from across the SiC value chain, in device design and fabrication, in SiC materials and epitaxy, in the testing and qualification of SiC products, and in the use of SiC products in applications such as the automotive industry.

Please contact us to discuss your company’s needs. We can assist you with on-going consultancy, leading edge reporting, new IP generation, project management, and education.

Name: DensBits Technologies Ltd.
Description:
DensBits has designed the world’s first Memory Modem (TM), a revolutionary technology created to address the ever-increasing need for low-cost, high-performance NAND Flash-based storage systems. Similar to communications modem technology, the Memory Modem – composed of proprietary Error Correcting Coding (ECC), Digital Signal Processing (DSP) and Management solutions – dramatically improves Flash memory reliability and, in turn, enables next-generation, low-cost Flash memory without compromising on performance.
 
Cooperating with leading Flash manufacturers and Flash-based storage providers, DensBits’ Memory Modem paves the way for next-generation Flash-based storage systems, addressing all of their limitations and exceeding them, with unparalleled success.

Name: EKK Eagle America Semicon Division
Description:
EKK Eagle America Semicon Division provides quality engineered solutions for its semiconductor customers, from concept to production.

Our vertical integration is what separates us from the competition. We are unique, because we produce our own monomers in making synthetic rubber.  This allows us to control our development and product from base monomer structure to polymerization, to finished O-ring.  All of this done in a clean room environment from polymerization to finished molded parts.   We don't require purchasing monomers and base resins from 3rd party vendors.  Therefore, we not only control the development and performance of our rubber but have a distinctive advantage in our price structure.

Our wide range of Superior elastomers from FKM’s to next generation plasma resistance FFKM’s allows us the ability to provide best of breed solutions to our semiconductor customers.

In addition, we offer all of our products in molded shapes, custom sizes and in all major “Bonded Gate” gate styles.

We have a long history of the OPM for several OEM’s for our quality Welded Bellows, Magnetic Fluid Vacuum Seals and Rotary Joint Seals.

EKK Semicon Division was established in 2010 as the sales and engineering division of EKK Eagle for all semiconductor markets outside of Japan.

SIMPLE

EFFECTIVE

Name: Space Codesign
Description:
Electronic gadgets like smartphones, GPS and tablets (such as the Apple iPad) have quickly become a part of our lives and it’s hard to imagine living without them!  But take a moment to consider that these devices are complex systems of hardware and software that must work well together – an ever-growing challenge to the electronics firms who create them.  Short product life cycles put severe limits on development time and cost, so these companies are hitting the wall on productivity. 

Our solution, called SpaceStudio, is advanced software for designing SoC-based embedded systems that works at a higher level called ESL, or electronic system level.  Using SpaceStudio to create their designs, engineers can rapidly evaluate hardware and software options, at the same time, in parallel, and achieve up to 30% reduction in product development time with improved quality.

久元電子目前在代工服務策略上，係以提供客戶整合性的Turn-key Solution服務為導向，服務範圍涵蓋半導體及光電產品，建立互補與平衡的多元化產品線，滿足PC週邊、邏輯(Logic)、混合訊號(Mixed-Signal)、非揮發性(Non-volatile)記憶體、MCU、RF及類比(Analog)電源等產品規格，並積極跨入CIS(CMOS Image Sensor影像感測器)及LCD驅動IC等領域，近年來更擴及包括陶瓷、石英玻璃、光學玻璃、PCB基板等特殊材料之切割研磨服務，以穩定且務實的經驗及高度彈性的生產線組合，來滿足客戶在後段製程上的需求。

由於久元電子在研發工作上的不斷投入，使測試技術具備高度的自主性，擁有數量龐大的自製機台可滿足客戶對產能的需求並降低成本，加強久元及客戶的競爭優勢；同時，久元也跨足光電產業，對於CIS、LED產品之測試及挑檢技術開發也具備顯著之成效，近期更延攬專業技術團隊，結合影像分析等新技術與自動化設備設計，成功研發出各類型外觀檢測機、光學檢測設備及CCM相機模組生產測試設備等，所開發之設備不論自用或銷售均得到客戶的高度肯定。

Name: Tystar Corporation
Description:
Tystar is a service- and solutions-oriented electronics and semiconductor equipment supplier specializing in diffusion, oxidation and LPCVD furnace systems as well as related equipment. Our products are known throughout the industry as dependable workhorse systems, fulfilling the need for high quality, efficiency and value.

Tystar has more than 30 years of combined experience developing equipment for the electronics manufacturing industry. Tystar's primary products include TYTAN furnace systems, process control systems, a wide range of additional process equipment and accessories, as well as value-added services. Our products are used in many segments of the business, serving manufacturers of integrated circuits, MEMS, power semiconductor devices, opto-electronic devices, solar cells, fiber optic devices and semiconductor materials.

Tystar developed and patented a unique heat-plug which provides the user with a much more compact furnace without compromising throughput. This design results in superior process uniformity and higher-yield wafer production.

Located in Garden Grove, California, Tystar Corporation was formed in 1988 after the acquisition of several product lines from Tylan Corporation, including the TYTAN furnace system for semiconductor device fabrication. Tystar assembled a team of experts in this field, bringing many years of experience to the company. With more than 1,600 furnace tubes installed and operational worldwide, Tystar maintains a global presence.

Our Approach

Name: Innovative Circuits Engineering, Inc.
Description:
Innovative Circuits Engineering, Inc, a company incorporated in January 1991, is based in the heart of Silicon Valley at 2310 Lundy Avenue in San Jose. Its founders, who are still the four principal officers, were motivated by a vision to establish and provide much needed IC Reliability services to semiconductor manufacturing companies, both established and start-ups. In the first two years, the Company was involved mainly in PCB design, assembly and testing, and subcontracted board fabrication to outside vendors in the Valley. In 1993, it added Reliability Engineering Services to its operations and continued to expand this area to provide a full range of services such as IC Qualification Services, Burn-in, HAST, Temp Cycle and many other IC Reliability and Environmental tests. Today it is one of the most prominent, customer focused, and quality driven Test Labs in the Valley, with certifications and accreditations including ISO9001, ISO17025, and DSSC.
 
As the company evolved, it expanded into new areas including ESD and Latch-up Testing, and Failure Analysis. These developments recognized the need to provide a wider scope of services to customers and to be of greater service to them.
 
The Company has established a reputation for meeting customer requirements by maintaining high standards in quality and service, at realistic prices.

Name: Innovative Silicon
Description: Innovative Silicon, Inc. (ISi) is the inventor and licensor of the Z-RAM ultra-dense memory technology for stand-alone DRAM memory applications.  Simpler to manufacture than traditional DRAM, Z-RAM is the world’s lowest-cost semiconductor memory technology.  Z-RAM is a “Zero Capacitor,” true single-transistor floating body memory that eliminates the complex capacitor found in today’s DRAM technologies – a fundamental roadblock to Moore’s Law of scaling.  Z-RAM provides semiconductor manufacturers a solution for nanoscale manufacturing processes that can dramatically lower semiconductor costs.  The Z-RAM memory technology has been licensed by Hynix Semiconductor for use in its DRAM chips, and by AMD for use in microprocessors.  Since 2003, the company has closed three funding rounds totaling $47 million, received dozens of patents on the technology, developed test chips in multiple technologies from 90nm to 32nm, and has established global R&D, engineering and support centers in Europe, Asia and North America.  For more information see www.z-ram.com.

Name: Pixim
Description: Pixim's Digital Pixel System technology revolutionizes the way video cameras capture and process images. Unlike traditional cameras, where each pixel cannot adjust to highlights and lowlights in the same scene, Pixim's patented Digital Pixel System technology empowers hundreds of thousands of pixels to act like individual cameras constantly self-adjusting. This all-digital system enables Pixim-powered cameras to efficiently capture the whole picture, regardless of lighting condition or application – thus securing the highest resolution, natural color and clarity, while automatically eliminating image-compromising visual noise (e.g., glare, reflections). The result is more than superb image quality; it is accurate, actionable information that gives users the strength of certainty.

Description:
Axenics is dedicated to helping customers identify and resolve manufacturing systems issues through the use of state-of-the-art welding and bending equipment and a customized problem solving approach. Axenics is committed to delivering solutions that are consistently on-time, cost-efficient, high quality, clean and repeatable, and tested for quality, and to assist our customers in effectively lowering costs through reduced production times. 

Axenics is an ISO 9001 certified and AC7004 accredited contract manufacturer with capabilities ranging from manual TIG and orbital welding, to tube brazing, bending and cutting, to quality testing services, and more. Our technicians are focused on providing quality metal and plastics manufacturing services to the Medical Device, Semiconductor, Life Sciences, Alternative Energy, Chemical Manufacturing and Aerospace industries. 

In addition to offering standard component and complex assembly services to the industries we serve, Axenics also provides custom design and engineering solutions to assist customers with design and flow issues, tight configuration limitations, and more. We have the staff, expertise and facility space to take over the manufacturing process for companies in need of an end-to-end solution.

Name: AutomatisierungsTechnik Voigt GmbH
Description:
AutomatisierungsTechnik Voigt GmbH is a successful partner in the industrial semiconductor production industry with innovative solutions for measuring, control and regulation technology and other similar customized measuring products. We provide turnkey, optimized systems and solutions for individual customer requirements including all necessary components and software applications from a single source.

We are system integrator und distribution partner for the following renowned companies:
- Keithley Instruments - A Tektronix Company
- MPI Corporation (Advanced Semiconductor Test and LED Production Stations)
- Celadon Systems, Inc.

Name: Delft Semiconductor
Description:
Delft Semiconductor offers design services focusing on power management, data conversion and sensor interfacing.

Our world-class professionals have built their careers creating market-leading products with some of the foremost analog and mixed-signal companies in the industry. Broad experience combined with our strong ties with the Delft University of Technology, we boast an impressive track record of creating innovative solutions for tough analog problems.

Tapping into our experience, as well as into our extensive and growing library of state-of-the-art Intellectual Property allows you to deliver globally competitive products on a tight schedule.

contact: info@delftsemi.com

Name: LB Semicon, Inc.
Description:
LB Semicon is a leading global provider of outsourced semiconductor packaging and test services. Established in 2000, the company has rapidly advanced in the IC packaging and test industry, becoming a key manufacturing partner for top semiconductor firms, foundries, and electronics companies worldwide. LB Semicon operates production facilities, product development centers, and sales and support offices across major electronics manufacturing hubs in Korea, Asia, and the USA.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services, including wafer bumping, redistribution services, wafer probing, die processing, wafer-level packaging, and chip-on-film packaging. These high-quality packaging and test services enable customers to concentrate on semiconductor design and wafer fabrication, relying on LB Semicon as their technology leader in packaging and test solutions. 

LB Semicon's advanced packaging technologies include Fan-Out WLP and advanced copper pillar bumping, while their test services support a variety of applications such as CIS, PMIC, SoC, DDI, and Recon.

Guided by the principle of "Look Beyond," LB Semicon is committed to ongoing innovation and excellence, positioning itself as a dependable partner and integrated packaging solution provider.

Name: 记忆科技（深圳）有限公司
Description:
记忆科技，成立于1997年，连续十五年蝉联中国内存市场占有率第一名，是全球第二大独立内存模组提供商以及全球领先PC品牌厂商和信息通讯设备厂商的战略供应商。作为国家级高新技术企业，记忆科技多次被评为"深圳市工业百强"、"全国外商投资双优企业"和"深圳市外商投资十大纳税企业"。
        记忆向客户提供内存、固态硬盘（SSD）、闪存卡等全系列存储产品及解决方案，产品广泛应用于移动终端、个人电脑、通信设备、工业控制计算机系统、企业级服务器、数据中心、云存储等等，并可为企业应用、消费电子以及特定领域进行定制化地设计、研发、生产和服务。       
        记忆在深圳、苏州、上海设有研发中心，拥有业界一流的料件实验室、兼容性实验室、可靠性测试及分析实验室、信号实验室、FPGA及芯片调试实验室、存储系统测试实验室等多个实验室。在深圳和惠州设立了两座现代化的制造基地，占地两万余平方米，拥有数十条世界一流的全自动化高速SMT生产线。         
        记忆的发展离不开管理的提升，自2007年起，分别与麦肯锡、德勤、韬睿等国际知名顾问公司深入合作，开展了战略、财务、人力资源、文化、流程等多个管理提升项目，通过自上而下的主动文化调整，实现了精细化管理，完善了管理体系和流程，保障了精准高效的全球化运作。
        记忆一贯秉承"服务客户，精准求实，诚信共享，创业创新"的核心理念，通过全体记忆人的努力，不断加强在产业链中的核心竞争优势，为客户持续地提供超出期望的产品和一流的服务，并致力于为员工提供创造和实现美好梦想的平台，将记忆打造成为高科技企业典范。

Name: RM Components GmbH
Description:
RM Components – Ihr Partner für passive und aktive elektronische Bauelemente

Seit 1996 steht RM Components für partnerschaftliche, moderne und international ausgerichtete Distribution von elektronischen Bauteilen. Als etablierter Distributor mit Sitz in Schwabach verfügen wir über Europas größtes Warenlager für Produkte von Taiyo Yuden (Japan) und HolyStone (Taiwan). 

Unser Portfolio umfasst hochwertige passive Bauelemente wie Keramikchipkondensatoren, Induktivitäten, Ferrite und Module, die in vielfältigen Anwendungen wie Automotive, Industrie, Telekommunikation und Medizintechnik eingesetzt werden.

Im Jahr 2024 haben wir unser Angebot strategisch erweitert und sind nun exklusiver Vertriebspartner für diskrete Halbleiter von HolyStone/Formosa. Dieser Schritt in den Bereich der aktiven Bauelemente ermöglicht es uns, unseren bewährten Service auf ein noch breiteres Produktspektrum auszudehnen.

25 Jahre Branchenerfahrung:

Unser engagiertes und kompetentes Team bietet Ihnen umfassenden technischen Support, individuelle Logistiklösungen und nahtlose Integration digitaler Schnittstellen wie EDI und API. Wir verstehen uns nicht nur als Lieferant, sondern als Ihr vertrauensvoller Partner, der flexibel und serviceorientiert zwischen Ihnen und den Herstellern vermittelt.

big service on small products

Description: SHARVI VLSI INSTITUTION offers vlsi course in both weekend and weekdays. Industrial expert trainers will help to achieve quality knowledge in vlsi domain. 3month and 6month long courses are there to ensure quality training.

E&R Engineering Corp. HQ locate at Yenchao, Taiwan, providing high-tech, high-end, high-class quality automation machines which focus on Semiconductor industry, LED, Passive component, Material,  Medical industry since 1994. 

E&R Specialist in Laser system integration,  Plasma technology which providing total solution for semiconductor industry. 

In the past 20 years, we have supply world leading brand customers and build up great partnerships with great services and quality products, successfully develop different projects and leading the market, creating value to all our customers.

Name: Witmem Technology
Description:
Founded in 2017, Witmem focuses on the field of computing-in-memory chips, innovatively uses Flash memory to complete the computing-in-memory of neural networks, solves the problem of AI storage walls, improves computing efficiency and reduces costs.

 

The R&D team is formed by Dr. Wang Shaodi and Dr. Guo Xinjie in conjunction with a number of scholars and industry practitioners. They have an average of more than 10 years of industrial work experience.

 

Witmem's WTM2101 chip is suitable for low-power AIoT applications, and can complete large-scale deep learning operations with microwatt to milliwatt power consumption, especially suitable for intelligent voice and intelligent health services in wearable devices, and has completed mass production and market applications . WTM8 series chips are aimed at 6-48Tops computing power products and are used for real-time processing of 4K-8K video.

 

In January 2023,Witmem announced the completion of the B2 round of financing. In the future, Witmem will continue focusing on the field of computing-in-memory chips and lead the industrialization of computing-in-memory.

Website: https://en.witmem.com/ 
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Witmem2017

Headquartered in Beijing, China.

Name: OT COMPONENTS LLC.
Description:
We founded OT Components out of the necessity for honesty and quality in the semiconductor industry. 

Our commitments are On-Time deliveries and Quality in all our products and services. We go above and beyond to ensure our customers' satisfaction. 

Our values are:  Honesty, Quality, and Commitment to complete customer satisfaction

Name: Absen Latinoamérica
Description: Absen Latinoamérica es la filial de Absen，que se estableció en el año 2001, es un proveedor global líder de soluciones de pantallas LED.

Name: Yitran Technologies Ltd.
Description: Yitran Technologies Ltd. is a fabless semiconductor company that designs, develops and markets highly robust, low cost PLC integrated circuits. Yitran is a leading provider of cutting edge communication technology for command and control IOT (Internet Of Things)  applications including Energy Management, Automatic/Remote Meter Reading, Home/Building Automation, Switching and Lighting, HVAC Control, Street Light control and more.

Name: E.K.S.S. Microelectronics Operating Your Silicon to Success.
Description:
"Operating Your Silicon to Success" 

EKSS Microelectronics provides a complete range of Semiconductor Services, which includes : Packaging, Test, Product/ Test Engineering, Qualification and Supply Chain Management. Our deep technical expertise enables us to comprehend every aspect of our customer needs.

We work with companies across a broad range of markets in a collaborative style, we are able to find solutions across a wide range of technologies & volumes by utilising our expertise and strategic partners.

Our full range of services can be viewed on our website www.ekss.co.il

Name: Mesoline
Description: Mesoline’s revolutionary microchannel particle deposition (MPD) technology represents a completely new way of creating microstructures using nanoparticles. By harnessing microfluidics, our machines can build wafer-scale microstructures with unprecedented accuracy, in a matter of minutes. We offer our customers a unique platform which combines tooling and years of expertise in MPD. This allows customers to create new devices incorporating nanoparticle based functional elements and metal layers

Name: Hexisense
Description:
Hexisense SA builds instruments that measure trace amounts of gas impurities in semiconductor manufacturing equipment.  Our solutions help our customers increase uptime, yield, and throughput in critical infrastructure.

We also offer custom microfabrication, precision electronics prototyping, and precision gas sensor benchmarking services.

Name: Willas-Array Electronics (Holdings) Limited
Description:
威雅利電子（集團）有限公司成立於1981年，40年來集團緊貼全球市場發展趨勢，透過公司內部的團結一致，以及與合作夥伴的緊密合作，業務由香港迅速發展至整個大中華地區，並以這些地區為核心再將業務擴展至全亞洲，與世界各地多家享負盛名的供應商建立了緊密而長遠的合作關係，在電子元器件經銷領域屹立於領導地位。

Founded in 1981, Willas-Array Electronics (Holdings) Limited has developed as one of the industry leaders of electronic components distribution in Hong Kong. The Group has always been keeping up with the market needs and trends throughout the last 40 years. By further combining the factors of dedicated staff-force with the close cooperation with business partners, Willas-Array demonstrated an extensive and rapid growth from Hong Kong to the Greater China area. The Group further expanded its core to the Asia-Pacific region, and established long term partnerships with reputable world-wide suppliers.

Name: Recore Systems
Description:
Recore Systems designs heterogeneous multi-core DSP processor systems, and IP to create Network-on-Chip (NoC)-based multi-processor DSP systems for FPGA and ASIC. Our technology has been developed for e.g. reliable data processing in space.

Technolution has taken over the IP design activities from Recore Systems.

Name: Jagruti Electronics Technologies
Description:
JET was founded in 2005 by promoters with more than 25 years of experience. Its vision is to become the first choice for customers among electronic component suppliers. Its mission is to achieve operational excellence through trust and transparency to provide proactive sourcing solutions.

We consider customer as our partners and add value to their business ventures through increased profitability and greater opportunities. As a part of kitting activity, we procure semiconductor components from leading manufacturers and their authorized distributors to provide the optimum combination of quality and cost. Our innovative way of sourcing and shipping provides absolute customer satisfaction – an emotionally compelling statement expressed by many customers. 

We represent global companies to source our customer requirements. We support our customers through techno commercial sales team to offer both technical assistance and value propositions whether it is a design-in activity or a socket replacement. We believe and committed to make continuous process improvement by being totally customer focused. Our experience allows us to custom design our services like vendor inventory management with local warehouse, stock and supply based on forecast with flexible payment terms to suit our customer requirements.

Name: AESG Inc.
Description:
AESG, Inc. is dedicated to continual improvement in diagnostic and testing techniques for automated equipment repair and refurbishment.

AESG is an alternative for high technology companies to outsource field service and emergency repairs to competent automation and process equipment specialists.
Our customers are OEM's and end-users in the Semiconductor equipment service sector.
-We specialize in PRI/Equipe and other Robotic wafer handling systems 
-We are familiar with "SEMI" Automation specifications 
-We have semiconductor FAB clean-room experience 
-We also service mini-environments, High Vacuum Systems, Lasers Systems, Optical Measurement Systems, CNC's and PLC's

Name: eVaderis
Description: eVaderis is the first semiconductor IP company offering solutions based on new disruptive embedded MRAM. The company’s broad portfolio of IP going from specialized memory, memory compiler, logic library and optimized MCU, helps customers to efficiently solve their design challenges in a wide range of markets: IoT, mobile, wearable, infrastructure. eVaderis headquarter is located in Grenoble area, France.

Name: Point Of Service Solutions Ltd
Description:
Point of Service Solution LTD. is an experienced Semiconductor Service Company offering Flexible Labor, On site Equipment Maintenance Support and designated Service center focusing on High-Tech Manufacturing and Semiconductor OEM’s & Fab operations.
Our  approach gives customers greater access to technical expertise, allowing lean operations and better risk management one customer at a time.

Name: Nuclei System Technology Co.,Ltd. (芯来科技）
Description: Nuclei System Technology Co. Ltd., is a leading RISC-V core IP company in China. The founder, Bob Hu is the creator of the first open source RISC-V core in China – Hummingbird E203,  and the author of the first RISC-V book in Chinese. The company has strong focus on developing RISC-V core IP, growing RISC-V market and ecosystem in China. It has released N200 series ultra low power RISC-V core IP for IoT application. It will extend the product line to provide more solution based on RISC-V to help the customer to reach the success by accelerating the innovation.

Name: Nova Technology (HK) Co.,Ltd
Description:
NOVA TECHNOLOGY (HK) CO LIMITED was established in 2007,  our  subsidiary company IC ONLINE CO LIMITED was set up in 2023, boasts over a decade of professional experience in the semiconductor field. We safeguard our customers' products from the research and development stage to a leading market position through our extensive stock of electronic components and a robust supply chain system, including material list handling, PCB/SMT/PCBA services. We've successfully assisted numerous customers in bringing their products from conceptual design to production, ultimately leading the market.

NOVA has established deep business cooperation and maintains close connections with renowned enterprises from the Fortune Global 500 as well as top 50 OEM EMS factories worldwide. As an ERAI member, we have received high recognition from our customers for both product quality and service excellence.

Our team is professional and well-rounded, consistently dedicated to providing customers with an exceptional experience, whether in sales or product support. Internally, we have strict procurement and inspection procedures in place and collaborate with multiple inspection institutions to offer the most reliable service to our customers.

To better serve our global customers, we have professional service teams in Vietnam, Japan, Europe, Mexico, and other locations to respond swiftly to customer needs. In the future, we will continue to expand our service regions to further enhance the customer experience.

NOVA looks forward to working hand in hand with you, turning more innovative designs into high-quality products, and enhancing your product production efficiency.

Name: Altcognito systems
Description: AltCognito Systems is the brainchild of a bunch of passionate technology enthusiasts. The privately held company with a global impression and sales coverage spanning the USA and Asia was established in 2018.

Name: KETEK GmbH
Description:
At KETEK in Munich, Germany, an experienced team of highly motivated engineers, physicists and technicians is developing and manufacturing a unique product portfolio around the Silicon Drift Detector, starting from the bare silicon wafer to the detector chip and further to the highly complex detector module.

We are offering our customers, located everywhere in the world, tailored solutions for their analytical devices and applications, including our in-house-developed analog and digital signal processing electronics.

Interested in working with us? Please find our current job opportunities at https://www.ketek.net/careers

Name: S.C New Energy Technology Corporation
Description:
S.C New Energy Technology Corporation is a photovoltaic & green energy equipment manufacturer with a rapid development in PV field, which predecessor was founded in Shenzhen, Guangdong province, in 2003. S.C New Energy Technology has successfully public listing in national small and middle-sized enterprise stock transfer systems.

With industrial parks covering 30,000 square meters in Shenzhen Guangdong Province, 50,000 square meters in Changzhou Jiangsu Province, S.C have more than 1000 employees, among which, 500 are R&D specialists.

S.C Products range from photoelectric equipments such as PECVD, diffusion furnace, texturing, PSG removal and edge isolation, cleaning  and automation equipments etc. to optoelectronic equipments like ZnO-MOCVD etc.

We offer not only the manufacturing equipments, but also the “Turnkey Project” solution and as well as automation solution for the whole photovoltaic solar cell production line.

 With the significant improvement in professionalization and large scale, internationalization is one of the major priorities in S.C’s future development.S.C has successfully exported equipments to India market in 2010 and to Japan market in 2011 and to Taiwan, Thailand, Malaysia, Vietnam and Singapore market in 2015.and achieved a major breakthrough in Turnkey project overseas in 2016.

Looking into the future, S.C will continue to insist on the target of “advanced technology, first-rating product and first class service” and dedicate to becoming the world’s leading new energy & specialized equipments manufacturer. S.C will always be, as a citizen, devoted to the production of clean energy and contributed to bright future of human beings.

Name: Target Compiler Technologies
Description: Target Compiler Technologies (www.retarget.com) is the leading provider of retargetable software tools to accelerate the design, programming and verification of application-specific processor cores (ASIPs). Target's IP Designer tool suite has been applied by customers worldwide for diverse application domains, including GSM, WCDMA and HSDPA handsets, VoIP, audio coding, automotive infotainment, ADSL and VDSL modems, wireless LAN, hearing instruments, mobile image processing, video processing, and various control and interfacing applications.  Target is a spin-off of IMEC, is headquartered in Leuven, Belgium, with North American operations in Boulder, Colorado.

Name: G2 Components
Description:
G2 Components (G2) is the leading expert at locating hard to find and obsolete semiconductors from around the world. Whether your requirements are for commercial, industrial or even military grade semiconductors, we have the resources to easily fulfill your needs.

Since getting to market is your number one concern, G2 works to get you there faster by translating your requirements into delivery. We stock thousands of obsolete electronic components, semiconductors, military components, switches, relays, CPU’s and hard drives. Our vast network of reliable domestic suppliers, international suppliers and OEM excess inventories enables us to locate your most difficult requirements.

Our goal is to put the world of electronic component inventory at the purchasing agents fingertips. The ever changing needs of the market, including long lead times, product obsolescence, failed delivery dates and lack of customer service, have become a daily dilemma for every electronic components buyer. At G2, we focus on solving these problems for you. You can expect reliability, fast quotations, immediate delivery, and exceptional prices.

Our mission is to bring “Peace of Mind” to our customers by providing an exemplary standard of quality service, outstanding technical solution support, in-depth inventory, professional selling procedures and the most reliable operational systems in distribution.

Name: Quantic Ticer
Description: Now on LinkedIn as "Quantic Ohmega Ticer," Ticer Technologies’ history of innovation began in 1884, with our original parent company becoming a leading manufacturer of electrodeposited copper foil. Today, we maintain a strong technology leadership position in high-performance, thin film embedded resistor copper foil for RF and printed circuit boards. Our flagship product, TCR, is able to meet the industry’s toughest challenges for mission-critical performance. Ticer technological and engineering prowess is complemented by our partnership with the industry’s most capable laminators, and our robust distribution channel. And as a Quantic company, we’re part of an extended engineering ecosystem and powerful supply chain, defining a competitive advantage that extends to every Ticer customer.

Name: Averlogic Technologies Corp.
Description:
Founded in 1996, AverLogic Technologies is a fabless semiconductor company with headquarters in Taipei, Taiwan. Specialized in high-performance application specific memory and video processing circuits, the Company has design centers in San Jose, California USA, and Taipei, Taiwan. 

Together with its foundry partners, AverLogic utilizes advanced CMOS technology and its own mixed signal design expertise to bring to market a full range of feature rich solutions. 

Current products include a wide array of video frame buffers, video decoders, LCD display controllers, format converters and highly integrated video processors. More recently, the company has added a 4K UHD Video Processing SoC, a 4K2K Video FIFO Memory, a H.264 Codec HD Video Streaming SoC, and a Full HD Video Conversion SoC to its lineup of video solutions. 

The company´s products are available from a worldwide network of representatives and distributors. 

AverLogic has been publicly listed on the Taiwan OTC Stock Exchange since 2002 (TOSE: 6198).

You can visit www.averlogic.com for additional information and product offerings.

Name: 合见工软
Description: 上海合见工业软件集团有限公司（简称合见工软）作为工业软件平台及解决方案提供商，以EDA（电子设计自动化，Electronic Design Automation）领域为首先突破方向，致力于帮助客户解决在半导体集成电路芯片设计、验证、实现和制造等过程中所面临的挑战，并成为他们值得信赖的合作伙伴。

Name: Hanyang Eng Co Ltd
Description:
HANYANG ENG has been recognized for its capabilities by accumulating various business experiences and technologies in domestic and overseas markets since its establishment in 1988.
Now, HANYANG ENG is pursuing substantial growth by discovering new business models and new markets in line with the changing global paradigm to enhance future value, and practicing transparent management.
Through this, we will be a ‘Total Solution Provider’ that provides optimized quality and services in not only the semiconductor/display industry but also in the fields of industrial plants, gas, environment, green energy, and aerospace.

Name: Agastya
Description:
Agastya is one of the leading Electronic Components distributors in South East Asia. We work with over 50 world class suppliers of Semiconductors, Passives, Interconnect and Electro-mechanical components to supply their products to OEMs, ODMs, EMS in various Industry segments such as Mobile Phone, Automotive, IOT, Consumer Electronics, Industrial, LED Lighting & Telecom.
              
Agastya plays a essential role in providing Technology Design and Supply Chain Management services to its customers. Headquartered in Singapore for the past 30 years, we have offices all over South East Asia staffed with sales and application engineers who work actively with customers design teams from the design stage till Mass Production. We provide our customers with hardware and software design services for their product. Our key strength lies in using technology to automate the forecasting, procurement and fulfillment activities on behalf of our customers to ensure optimal efficiency of their supply chain. Automating the procurement and supply chain management for our customers remains our main goal.

We have grown rapidly by being a valuable partner to our suppliers and customers by increasing product development speed, lowering cost of supply chain management by kitting and other services and connecting them to other revenue generating opportunities.

Name: HashData
Description: Experts in microchip and semiconductor design

Name: Toshiba Memory Europe
Description:
Toshiba Memory Europe GmbH (TME) was the European business of the Toshiba Memory Corporation (TMC). The company offered a broad product line of high-end Flash memory products, including SD Cards, USB sticks, Micro SD's and embedded memory components, in addition to solid state drives (SSD). TME maintained Offices in Germany, France, Spain, Sweden and the United Kingdom. By 2019/10/01 Toshiba Memory was taken over by the American Bain Group and ceased operations in many locations. A new company with the name Kioxia was created which can be translated to value memory. 

Toshiba Memory used to be the second largest NAND Flash manufacturer in 2019.

Name: SPEC Equipment Corporation
Description:
SPEC Equipment Corporation is a leading provider of re-manufactured and refurbished semiconductor process equipment for the semiconductor industry. 

Specializing in performance enhancements and upgrades to semiconductor process equipment since 1998, founder John Sardi and SPEC Equipment’s highly trained team will supply, support, refurbish and service industry leading front-end equipment and process configurations. 

SPEC has proven to be a valuable global partner to top-tier semiconductor manufacturers, start-ups, R&D labs and universities. We manufacture Gasonics Aura 1000 and L3000 series systems, refurbish and update Gasonics Aura 1000, 2000 series, L3510 and 3000 series systems, and service KLA-Tencor series systems. SPEC also provides sales and service for ADE metrology equipment.

With SPEC's semiconductor equipment refurbishment processes, you are guaranteed exceptional extended equipment performance and advanced process proficiency with the greatest savings.

Name: Seamax Engineering Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1983, Seamax Engineering Pte Ltd is the exclusive representative and distributor of numerous leading electronic and electromechanical brands, offering ICs, Sensors, Passive and Discreet components, Magnetic and Inductive components, Power Supplies, RF solutions, Electromechanical and Mechanical components, modules and solutions.

Focusing on technical design-in and alternate source cross referencing, we share better solutions, bring the latest technologies and savings to our customers.

Name: 美特科技(苏州)有限公司
Advanced Vacuum
Description: Advanced Vacuum manufactures bench-top Etch and Deposition systems ideally suited for small R&D and Material Research scientists, where space is at a premium.

Name: Olympus Sky Technologies, S.A.
Description:
We help IoT vendors to get more revenue through enhancing their products with the best-in-class security layer.

We bring certainty and peace of mind to owners of smart factories, smart buildings, smart vehicles, that they won't lose money because of being hacked.

Olympus Sky is an R&D company that developed a holy grail of security in the world of the IoT. We work with startups, gov agencies, automotive and the big industry, bringing protection to their connected devices and their networks. 

We hold three US patents, the team consists of amazing data science PhDs, engineers, and five seasoned business leaders. We have professional VCs on board. We have sales and engineering coverage in the US and in Europe.

Name: SmarTTEC
Description:
SmarTThermoelectrics «ST» specializes in design, developing and manufacturing of small sized thermoelectric coolers (TECs) and completed thermal management systems based on these TECs. Our thermoelectric products are often integral part to the electronic and optoelectronic components, assemblies and systems in variety of industrial sectors: telecommunications, medical, aerospace, automotive, military, consumer electronics, science and education etc. «ST» TECs are widely used for cooling and temperature control ofsemiconductor lasers, light emitting diodes (LEDs), X-Ray and IR detectors, Charged Coupled Devices (CCD), central processor units (CPUs)and many other objects where localized/spot heat rejection or heating is needed.

Along with manufacturing practice, «ST» being R&D Company focused on permanent researches in field of thermoelectric technology and application as well as on thermal management issues of electronic components. Our company provides complex thermal management services from initial problem definition to the supply of efficient thermal solution. Presence of the qualified team and high-tech equipment, utilizing superior computer programs and mathematic methods in a combination with permanent investments into R&D allow us to deliverourclients effective solutions which will meet their special demands.

Name: Quantum Engineering for Machine Learning
Description:
The QUEFORMAL project proposes a radical vision of a new integrated circuit technology for machine learning where low-voltage field-effect transistors and non-volatile memories are integrated next to each other exploiting quantum engineering of heterostructures of two-dimensional materials (2DMs), i.e. the atom-by-atom design and fabrication of devices, which combine vertical and lateral heterostructures of 2DMs.

Our vision is based on the insight that heterostructures of 2D materials (in particular Transition Metal Dichalcogenides) provide a unique opportunity to engineer new materials almost atom by atom, essentially eliminating the boundary between electronic materials and devices

Name: Exnodes
Description:
Exnodes detects 20 nanometer defects at 120 wafers per hour to maximize yield of computer chips. To license Exnodes technology and patents for your next generation product, please write to us at onboard@exnodes.com

Using an 8.9 nanometer sensitivity breakthrough with visible light, computational parallel inspection (CPI) enables unpatterned wafer inspection without the baggage of DUV. While standard methods rely on brute force increasing of scattered signal levels with shorter wavelengths, CPI rethinks nanoscale defect detection with information theory and maximizes sensitivity by leveraging the maturity and gentleness of visible light.

Exnodes is made possible by world’s leading semiconductor companies and by inventors, builders and nurturers determined to make the nanoscale accessible for all of us.

Name: Applicos
Description:
Applicos, of Zwolle, Netherlands, was founded in 1993 and specializes in mixed signal measurement technologies for the semiconductor industry.  Applicos delivers a test suite that includes hardware, highly integrated software, and a specialized suite of test methodologies.  This combination of technologies ensures consistent measurement results across the data converter development cycle from design engineering to production test.  

The ATX7006 offers a flexible ADC/DAC quantification system that can flexibly test a wide variety of devices, and application of the software test suite ensures consistent, reproducible results and engineering rigor.  Thus, the same platform can be used to enhance productivity of design and device validation engineers, while significantly reducing production test times at a fraction of the cost of ATE upgrades.  The ATX7006 is a very cost effective way to add coherent mixed signal test capability to digital ATE, while maintaining correlation of results found earlier in the product cycle.

Applicos, a Salland Engineering company since 2018.

NASCENTechnology is a Watertown, South Dakota company that designs and manufactures multi-layer ceramic transformers for defense, medical, and energy exploration applications.
