Name: Avatar Integrated Systems Inc.
Description:
Avatar Integrated Systems (AIS) is a leading software company in the Electronic Design Automation (EDA) industry focused on Physical Design Implementation. The company's products enable integrated circuit (IC) designers to create semiconductor chips which enable today's electronic devices, such as smartphones, computers, internet equipment, IoT wearable, etc.

Avatar's product line includes Aprisa, a netlist-to-GDS full-function block-level physical implementation tool, and Apogee, a complete top-level proto-typing, floor-planning and chip assembly tool.  The patented technologies were developed specifically to deal with the design challenges at 28nm and below. Avatar's products have been certified by the industry's top semiconductor foundries for designs at advanced process nodes, such as 28nm, 20nm, 16nm, 14nm, 10nm and 7nm. As a result, our patented technology has been adopted by world leading IC design companies with numerous successful tape-outs.

Name: iConnexion Asia Pte. Ltd.
Description:
iConnexion Asia Pte. Ltd. is a distributor of passive and electromechanical electronic components as well as a supplier of value-added cable assembly services, Flexible and Rigid PCBs Solutions. Through our hard work, dedication to sound business concepts and a commitment to customer satisfaction, iConnexion has enjoyed continuous growth. iConnexion is dedicated to those principles that have proven so valuable in the past.

The goal of iConnexion is to succeed as an Asia Pacific regional distributor by focusing on a comprehensive and complimentary line card and targeting passive, electromechanical and interconnect components. Our size and focus allow us to provide a local inventory of a broad selection of our principles products. iConnexion emphasizes a strong engineering capability and customized programs to serve their needs.

iConnexion has earned a solid reputation as a professional, knowledgeable and aggressive distributor providing excellent service and competitive pricing to our customers.

Name: HMT microelectronic AG
Description:
HMT microelectronic AG has more than 40 years experience in the design and supply of ASICs, primarily for sensors and actuators and over 500 designs have entered production.
 
Our specialities are robust ICs for high voltage, high temperature applications like motor drivers and piezo actuators as well as low-noise and micro-power ICs for sensors and medical.

We provide automotive IC qualification (AEC-Q100) and production test for zero defect.  The full design and production is qualified for medical production (ISO13485).

We were an early adopter of industry communication standard, IO-Link, and offer a range of IC and product services around IO-Link.

We work together with automotive qualified foundry partners to assure long product life-time.

Name: Hollytec Comercio e Industria de Materiais Eletricos
Description: Hollytec manufactures and distributes electrical conductors, including copper and aluminum wires, flexible cables, and copper rods. Its product range encompasses items such as enamelled aluminum wires, flexible cables rated for 70C and 105C, and electrolytic copper wires produced to specific measurements. The company also supplies insulating materials like polyester films and Nomex papers, as well as varnishes and paints for electrical applications.

Name: High Precision Devices is now FormFactor
Description:
High Precision Devices (HPD), was acquired by FormFactor in 2020. More information about HPD precision cryogenic systems and instruments is available at www.formfactor.com

FormFactor, Inc. (NASDAQ:FORM), is a leading provider of essential test and measurement technologies along the full IC life cycle –from metrology and inspection, characterization, modeling, reliability, and design de-bug, to qualification and production test. Semiconductor companies rely upon FormFactor’s products and services to accelerate profitability by optimizing device performance and advancing yield knowledge. The Company serves customers through its network of facilities in Asia, Europe, and North America.

Name: X-Celeprint
Description:
Our business is developing and licensing patented Micro-Transfer-Printing (μTP) technology. Originally invented in Professor John Rogers’ laboratory at the University of Illinois, Urbana-Champaign, μTP is a cost-effective and scalable manufacturing platform for integrating microscale devices such as lasers, LEDs or integrated circuits onto non-native substrates.

A wholly owned subsidiary of XTRION N.V., X-Celeprint works globally with partners to adapt its μTP technology for their specific applications. X-Celeprint is headquartered in Cork, Ireland, with facilities within the Tyndall National Institute.

Name: ISMOsys Group Ltd
Description:
ISMOsys ( Integrated Sales Marketing Operations Systems ) is a Pan-European representative company, comprising of commercial, sales and technical expertise, acquired by Astute Electronics in April 2021.

We represent major semiconductor and electronics component manufacturers throughout Europe, providing unparalleled support to design houses, designers and engineers. We support advances in design through strong relationships with both the manufacturer and designer. Our collaboration with leading distributors and industry partners allows us to drive sales and revenues for the partners with whom we are engaged.

With regional offices and representation throughout Europe & India, our localised approach means expertise in each territory and a more personal service to design houses, designers and engineers.

Name: Angstrom Sciences, Inc.
Description:
Angstrom Sciences, Inc. was founded in 1988 by Mark Bernick. The company designs and manufactures advanced Magnetron Sputtering Cathodes and provides High Purity Materials for thin film deposition applications spanning the solar, semiconductor, automobile, aerospace, and packaging industries. 

The patented, profiled magnet technology within Angstrom Sciences' Magnetron Sputtering Cathodes maximizes process efficiency. The company is privately held, employs 30 highly skilled specialists, is headquartered in an 18,000 square foot facility outside of Pittsburgh, Pa., and has a sales and distribution network of nearly 40 companies around the world.

Name: PTSL
Description:
Probe Test Solutions Ltd (PTSL) is a world leader in delivering advanced ATE test hardware solutions to our blue chip customers globally. We are a technically driven company with a proven track record of pioneering engineering solutions to the most challenging test floors in the world.

The PTSL workforce prides itself on working closely with our customers and our team is fully committed to developing long-term partnerships which offer success to our clients, keeping our company values at the forefront of everything we do.

Name: Qromis, Inc.
Description:
Qromis, Inc. was established in March 2015 and located in Silicon Valley, California, is a privately held fabless technology innovator focusing on energy efficient and high performance wide bandgap (WBG) semiconductor materials and device solutions which dramatically reduce global energy use and consumption.

The Company is poised to become one of the premier players in the rapidly growing, multi-billion dollar WBG industry with its disruptive and validated solutions in substrate and device technologies, which enable an unmatched cost, performance, and application scale. Markets served include power electronics, light emitting diodes (LEDs), advanced displays, and RF electronics, and other emerging high performance and energy efficient applications.

As a fabless company, Qromis is driving the commercialization of its unique solutions in conjunction with its foundry network. The Company and its foundry partner offer WBG device foundry services, as well as access to advanced and novel process technology platforms, for its customers and partners.

Name: Atlatron

Name: O2Micro
Description:
Founded in April 1995, O2Micro International limited (NASDAQ: OIIM) designs, develops and markets innovative power management components for the Computer, Consumer, Industrial, Automotive and Communications markets. Its strengths lie in its system architecture knowledge in power management, fast time-to-market, strong customer relationships, and mixed signal engineering Integrated Circuit (IC) capabilities. The strength in mixed signal engineering is due to O2Micro's talented teams of analog and digital engineers.

With offices worldwide, the company is staffed by a team of industry veterans with a successful track record and proven expertise in design, marketing, and operations. The company's IC products are manufactured by recognized foundries worldwide.

O2Micro maintains an extensive portfolio of intellectual property, and has numerous trademark applications and copyright registrations.

O2Micro's extensive list of customers includes most of the world's leading electronics manufacturers of Computer, Consumer, Industrial, Automotive and Communications products.

Name: Shineon（Nanchang）Technology Co., Ltd.
Description:
ShineOn is a leading global LED package and module solution provider for lightings and display market. It was established in January 2010 with a registered capital of $35 million and was founded by a team of optoelectronics industry experts with experience in US high-tech companies. ShineOn is strongly backed up by famous USA and Chinese venture capital firms, including GSR ventures, Northern Light Venture Capital, IDG-Accel Partners and Mayfield, and is also supported by Beijing municipal government.

ShineOn develops the world leading LED packages and modules for high performance, wide color gamut TV backlighting and for high efficient, high reliability light source. It’s SMD, COB, CSP packages and DoB driver integrated module have been used by many high quality TV and general lighting customers like LG,TCL,Skyworth and so on.

ShineOn has obtained certification from CNAS and EPA for its LM-80 laboratory. It implemented advanced MES and ERP system in its production line and established a strict quality management system. The company's vision is to provide customers competitive solutions and most reliable products, and to add value to its customers.

ShineOn was recognized as a 2011 Global Clean-tech 100 company, and won 2013 Red Herring Global 100 Award. It was also named as 2014 Deloitte Top 50 Fast Growing High Tech Company in China.

Name: Temple Computing Labs
Description:
Temple Computing Labs LLP is founded in the year 2011 with the focus of doing research and development in the field of computing. The company aims at developing hardware and software intellectual properties (IPs) which will be available for licensing on customers computing platforms.

The Java Offload Engine (JOE) is the first intellectual property developed by Temple Computing Labs and is based on the 'SideKick' co-processing framework that has been developed in house. JOE is delivered as a soft core and integrates with the main processor on a SOC. To know more please visit http://templetechlabs.com/products.html

The company is founded by Sumanranjan Mitra a techie and Java Virtual Machine hobbyist with more than 10 years of experience in the semiconductors and embedded systems domain. 

The company is registered as a 'Limited Liability Partnership' with the government of India, ministry of corporate affairs.

Name: Win Win Precision Technology Co Ltd (4949)
Description:
Win Win Precision Technology Co Ltd (4949) is a legal services company.

Established in November 2003, Win Win Precision Technology Co., Ltd core business is in providing vertically integrated solar PV total solutions.

Over the years, Win Win Precision Technology gained the trust, recognition and confidence of major solar PV and semiconductor companies worldwide. Win Win Precision Technology’s active investment in product market development coupled with active collaborations with renowned players in the solar and semiconductor industry spears our company’s technology services to greater heights.

We as Win Win Group with a long-standing history in the semiconductor industry strongly believe in the potential of solar technology as a major viable energy source of the future. In parallel to the semiconductor industry, we are aware of the further cost-reduction potential and economies of scale that will make solar electricity costs competitive to traditional energy sources in the foreseeable future. It is our passion to design, produce and supply the most cost-effective products of the highest quality standard, and our commitment to advocate and advance the broad societal acknowledgment of solar systems as an alternative energy solution.

In 2007, Win Win Precision Technology re-organized into two business divisions. The Semiconductor Division and the Solar Division. The Solar division was established to ride the new solar PV business wave. We are driven by quality excellence and cost-effectiveness. We are committed to sustainable management on the basis of business models that meet the market. Our business models rely on long-term strategic partnerships with customers. To express our uniqueness in quality excellence and our drive to perfection, we created a new brand name called "WINAICO" that is inherently linked to those virtues.

Win Win Precision Technology’s worldwide headquarters is located in Taiwan. Our subsidiaries and branch offices stretch from Asia to Europe. Our Europe headquarters is in the Netherlands. Offices located in Germany, Italy and France facilitate direct marketing, sales, system installation and efficient customer after-sales services in Europe.

Name: RCH Associates, Inc.
Description:
RCH Associates, Inc.,  located in Fremont, California, was established in 1990 and has since become an international leader in providing Low Pressure Chemical Vapor Deposition (LPCVD) and Diffusion Furnace Systems Technology to the semiconductor industry.

Our Mission

RCH Associates, Inc. is committed to working closely our  customers and utilizing our 30+ years of Semiconductor equipment experience to determine their exact requirements. For more information about RCH and what we can do for you, please visit our website at www.rchassociates.com, call us at (510)657-7846, or email me at jcoulter@rchassociates.com.

Name: ICZOOM Corporation
Description: Launched in 2012 by industry veterans Lei Xia & Darrow Liu, the exchange platform unites buyers & sellers of electronic components, allowing market forces and transparent data to determine component prices.  With more than 1000+ customers across China, ICZOOM's platform anonymously 'matches' buyers & sellers, helping the massive ecosystem to manage issues like chip shortages and excess inventory, historically major problems for an industry where the product lifecycle is ~18 months.  Welcome to ICZOOM.

We feature replacement Inficon, Balzers, Sloan, Ulvac, and Maxtek replacements available in 5 and 6 MHz frequencies. We also offer all standard electrode coatings including gold and silver. However, not only do carry a full line of replacement quartz crystals, we also are home to the Nucleus and Quark line of film-thickness monitors and controllers. 

Our dual-channel, Nucleus and Quark systems are designed and built in the USA and feature full temperature measurement and frequency correction,  so check out our catalog today!

Description:
Valence Process Equipment was founded in 2007 by a team of III-V industry professionals. The mission was to provide custom MOCVD systems to clients in leading R&D and industrial environments. We work closely with our partners to create optimized solutions that give our clients a competitive edge.  

At the core of all Valence MOCVD systems lies our patented e-profile wall reactor. This breakthrough design reduces carrier gas and reactant use by up to 30% in comparison with established reactor designs. Maintenance requirements are also significantly reduced – leading to dramatic cost-of-ownership benefits. 

Visit our website for more information!

Name: UNIC Memory Technology (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
UniGroup is a famous high-tech industry and investment group in China with assets of more than 200 billion yuan. 紫光集团是中国著名的高科技产业与投资集团，资产规模超过2000亿人民币。在国家集成电路产业推进战略引导下，全面构筑从“芯”到“云”的信息产业生态系统。旗下4家上市公司，半导体产业之外，还涉足科教地产、城市燃气、科技投资等多个领域。

Name: Silicon RF Synergy
Description:
Silicon RF Synergy is the business and technical representative in the Americas for foundry MPW, engineering lot and silicon wafer prototyping services offered by the Innovations for High Performance Microelectronics center (IHP) in Frankfurt (Oder), Germany. 

The IHP is a world-renowned R&D center for silicon high frequency integrated circuits, silicon photonics and technologies for wireless and high-speed wire line communication, aerospace, biotechnology, medicine, security and automation.  We provide commercial foundry, wafer test and silicon design services as well as US West Coast based expert level support to help customers bridge the gap between chip design and wafer fab for achieving a successful tape-out and product design cycle.

Name: Kinesys Software

KINESYS Software is a small, independent software company, founded in 1992 in The Netherlands and providing software products and services for specialized technical automation applications in the semiconductor industry. 

In our market, KINESYS Software is widely known and has a strong reputation. Our customers include many of the familiar world-leading manufacturers of semiconductors and related products, located in all major production areas (South-East Asia, Japan, North America, Europe), as well as companies that manufacture production equipment for semiconductor manufacturing.

Our main development office is in Utrecht, The Netherlands. We also have offices in Japan, Mexico, Singapore, Taiwan and the USA. For sales and support of our software we work together with semiconductor equipment manufacturers and with regional representatives and resellers.

Description:
At the heart we are just ordinary people here at Metapps. We work, we play, we spend
time with friends and family, and we try to live life to our fullest potential. So what
makes us different? We are a small group of engineers and business people that decided
to leave our early professional lives of working for large and small corporations to form
our own company, believing we could achieve more both professionally and
personally. Each member of our team has, on average, at least a decade of experience
working in manufacturing and research environments for a wide range of technical
industries, and specifically possess expert knowledge in metrology ‐ the science of
measurement. We are passionate about it and you’ll see that in just about everything we
do.
 
In the ever‐increasing complexity that occurs today in manufacturing processes, there is
an increasing need for metrology to exist even more. We’re here to help. Whether or
not you need to review and optimize your current metrology processes or need new
ones, we have the experience you need to control your production or research line. And
we don’t just provide you with technical recommendations for your solutions, we help
integrate the solution into your existing work environment, providing the highest
possible positive impact with the lowest disruption. Since virtually every member of our
team has worked in a production environment, we understand the necessity of practical
solutions over theoretical ones. Yet we also understand that the theoretical basis for our
solutions must be sound, industry‐accepted methods.
 
At the end of the day, our team wants to go home to their families feeling they have
made a positive contribution to those they’ve encountered that day. Working with
customers like you gives that to us. If you’re reading this, you’re already a
customer. However your metrology is running, we can probably help improve it. Our list
of services grows by the day. Check them out. And if there’s something not already
listed, we’re happy to consider new, exciting problems! Contact us today.

Name: Reedholm Instruments Co.
Description:
Since 1983, we have focused on dc test systems used by semiconductor manufacturers to make measurements on electrical test structures. Because of the broad application of test structures, our test systems help assure quality and reliability in process development, wafer acceptance testing, and reliability evaluation. In addition, manufacturers of integrated sensors, GaAs circuits, CCDs, and discrete transistor manufacturers find our systems to be very cost effective for final test applications.

Our proprietary memory-mapped instruments and switching matrix modules span microvolts to 2kV and femtoamps to 5A. Because of that range, and because we complement existing instruments with new designs, we have been able to put together systems for the latest digital technologies as well as high power analog circuits and transistors. In addition, we have configured high capacity custom systems for reliability studies and have replaced home-built and obsolete test systems that are difficult to maintain. 

In addition to providing a wide range of instruments, we enhance performance with proprietary software. At the lowest level, instrument drivers control instrumentation and switching matrices without latency delays and uncertainties incurred by most instrumentation software. At the highest level, data driven applications software eliminates the need to turn device engineers into programmers.

Name: Roguevation, Inc.
Description:
Roguevation, Inc. was founded by two Semiconductor Automatic Test Equipment (ATE) industry veterans in September 2009.  The company was established to focus on two key software areas within the Semiconductor Test market not previously addressed by commercially available products – offline software analysis tools and standards-based general purpose ATE operating system (O/S).

Offline software analysis tools that process failing data collected by ATE.  While tools exist for analyzing parametric data collected by ATE, there has been a gap between user requirements and commercial tools that analyze logic failures resulting in many in-house tools.  As logic test strategies shift from behavior to structural using Design for Test (DFT) methodologies, failing data can be cross-referenced with logic design through Roguevation solutions, for failure analysis.

Standards-based general purpose ATE O/S. With advancements in both DFT and commercially available ATE Systems-on-a-Chip (SOC) components, the demand for alternative test platforms can be met by new ATE manufacturers.  However, the investment to make a software operating system that meets the needs of ATE users can be cost and time prohibitive.  With the general purpose ATE O/S from Roguevation, alternative suppliers can benefit from significantly reduced development costs and time to market.

Description:
Our Dynamic characterization means to extract device parameters under switching operation (ex. 100kHz, 20% duty continuously) instead of static or multi-pulse.
We provided 1st total solution for dynamic characterization of GaN which is capable to extract following parameters.

For Transistor under Hard Switching (10C<Tc<175C, Vdd<=800V, Id<=10A, f<=300kHz, 90%<duty<10%) to extract
1.  Dynamic Rdson, (Turn-on<10ns, Turn-off<50ns, measurement response < 200ns) 
2.  Dynamic Vth (-10V<Vg<10V swept) 
3.  Dynamic HTOL (Dynamic Rdson aging with stress time) 

For Transistor under ZVS, Soft switching, (10C<Tc<175C, Vdd<=800V, Id<=10A, f<=500kHz, 90%<duty<10%) to extract
1.  Dynamic Rdson
2.  Dynamic Rsdon
3.  Dynamic Vth
4.  Dynamic Vsd
5.  Dynamic HTOL  (Dynamic Rdson, Dynamic Rsdon or Dynamic Vsd aging with stress time) 

For Rectifier under switching  (10C<Tc<175C, Vdd<=800V, Id<=10A, f<=500kHz, 90%<duty<10%) to extract
1.  Dynamic Vf
2.  Dynamic Qrr
3.  Dynamic HTOL (Dynamic Vf aging with stress time).

For Static comparison, this tool will also provide Static Ron, Static Vth, Static If-Vf, Pulse Id-Vd (>=1us, Vd<10V, Id<10A) & thermal Rjc (Tj).

Name: IoTissimo
Description:
We are focused on developing technology for the 21st century - from silicon to systems. No over-hyped AI, just real world applications that propel the Industry forward in "More than Moore" integration, Power Management and Wireless applications.
A History of Innovation:
Three decades of continuous innovation across multiple technologies and product spaces:
•	First fully integrated motor drivers for HDD (Spindle, Stepper and Voice Coil Motors). The technology and architectures I developed in the early 90’s are still at the basis of what is in production today:
o	First sensor-less spindle motor controller 
o	First fully integrated Combo 
o	First digital controller
•	First fully integrated analog Read/Write Channel for HDD
•	First SoC implementation integrating DRAM (Data and System Controller for HDD). The project started with the 0.35um CMOS lithography node!
•	First high-performance Digital Audio Power Amplifiers (first truly Hi-Fi Digital Power). I led the re-engineering of the product to make it manufacturable and cost-effective.
•	First high-performance fixed-frequency hysteretic Buck converter (3-6 MHz operation for leading mobile products). Also, state-of-the-art Boost and low-power LDO for mobile
•	First Integrated DC-DC converter with inductor
•	First integrated multi-phase near time-optimal buck converter (for mobile products)
•	First commercial implementation of Resonant Wireless Power Transfer (WPT) at 6.78 MHz (received the Best of CES Innovation Award in 2015) and creation of the standard for WPT.
•	First WPT battery charger requiring no DC-DC conversion
•	First high-performance variable capacitor technology integrated in silicon processes for tuning RF and mmWave circuits.
…and now continuing to set the trend with developments in:
•	Power management integration for high performance computing
•	Advanced Wireless Power Transfer technologies
•	Other underlying technologies for IoT

High Yield Solutions has been a global provider of spare parts and refurbished equipment for the semiconductor industry since 2006. High Yield Solutions Post Warranty Group enables customers to effectively manage assets throughout the post-warranty ownership cycle.

OEM Parts

Our business is driven by a real-time, online inventory management system that provides the most accurate and reliable channel for tracking spare parts usage, pricing, and availability. We leverage global partnerships and an extended sales network to ensure inventory availability and rapid distribution of parts worldwide - reducing the financial impact of down systems during planned maintenance or emergency situations.

System Maintenance

At High Yield Solutions we understand that cost-effective system maintenance and upgrades are essential to any successful asset management program. Support

SemiBuffer explores how AI, blockchain, and automation are reshaping the supply chain.

From quoting and lead-time management to demand planning and engineering collaboration, supply chains have always been about people managing complexity. But what happens when AI crews — intelligent agents working side by side with humans — become part of the equation?

We’re researching and writing about:

- The role of large language models (LLMs) in supply chain decision-making
- The shift from manual firefighting to autonomous, real-time dashboards.

We don’t just comment on trends — we connect them to the real-world challenges supply chain leaders face every day.

 Subscribe and follow for forward-looking perspectives, practical insights, and strategies designed to give you an edge.

Name: Planar Semiconductor Inc
Description:
Planar Semiconductor, Inc. (Planar or the Company) is a semiconductor capital equipment company that has developed the Pulsar family of extraordinary vertically-oriented 200mm and 300mm single wafer pulsed-jet wet clean tools, which are unique in their ability to clean the front, backside and bevel area of a wafer simultaneously. Planars pulsed-jet technology  incorporated first on its Generation I tools  has been proven in high volume production wherein it provided a demonstrable yield gain to a major memory chip manufacturer. The current Generation II technology  incorporated on Planars Pulsar tools now ready for mass production  stands alone in successfully resolving several yield, cost, and technical challenges now affecting production fabs processing wafers at 35/32nm and smaller (advanced) geometries.

Based out of Silicon Valley, California, Planars management team has over 75 years of combined experience in the semiconductor industry, of which 25+ years are specifically related to wafer cleaning.  The company's advisory board is comprised of highly experienced industry executives who have an excellent records of success in the semiconductor capital equipment business.

自成立以来，莱利始终坚持以人为本、诚信立业的经营原则，荟萃业界精英，挖掘和栽培具有潜力的技术工程师，为客户提供优质的解决方案。为了更加深入地了解客户的需求，始终致力于发展长期稳定的战略合作关系。以高效高质的交付、灵活的合作模式以及以客户为中心的服务理念获得客户的认可及信赖，并为众多国际知名企业提供多次设计及研发服务。    

    具体内容包括芯片前端验证,可测性设计,芯片后端验证,帮助客户在微电子芯片产品设计中加入先进的测试设计，使得所实际的芯片制造测试、开发和应用变得更为容易，成本更低，产品的稳定性更高。同时莱利设计了先进的数字隔离器芯片和隔离式CAN收发器，电池使用大数据分析方法和专业的测试硬件软件。

我们拥有丰富的项目交付和驻场服务的管理经验，项目管理体系完善，相关项目管理人员均为业内专家，且均通过了国际PMP认证，为您的项目保驾护航。同时还拥有多名博士作为主要技术骨干。成立至今拥有员工50余人和超过500个专业工程师的资源池。

Name: Xianxin Technology Co., Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Xianxin Technology, where innovation meets excellence. At Xianxin, we are passionate about driving technological advancements that make a lasting impact. As a team of dedicated professionals, we specialize in developing cutting-edge IC products and solutions that cater to the ever-evolving demands of the global market. With a focus on OLED panel applications, we harness the power of data-driven insights and strategic marketing to create dynamic strategies for success. Our commitment to staying at the forefront of the display industry extends to exploring emerging technologies like Mini-LED and Micro-LED. We take pride in our collaborative approach, working hand-in-hand with our clients to understand their unique needs and deliver tailored solutions. Join us on our journey as we continue to shape the future of technology and redefine what's possible.

欢迎来到北京显芯科技有限公司，创新与卓越的交汇之地。在显芯科技，我们充满激情，致力于推动技术的不断进步，以在行业产生持久的影响。作为一支充满敬业精神的团队，我们专注于开发高端芯片产品及其解决方案，以满足全球市场不断演变的需求。在OLED 面板应用领域，我们利用数据驱动的洞察力和战略性营销，创建了成功的动态战略。我们致力于保持在显示行业的前沿地位，积极探索mini-LED 和micro-LED 等新兴技术。我们以协作为荣，与客户紧密合作，了解其独特需求，并提供量身定制的解决方案。加入我们的旅程，一起塑造技术的未来，重新定义可能性。

베이징 신신 테크놀로지 한 회사에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여기는 혁신과 탁월함이 만나는 곳입니다. 신신에서는 지속적인 기술 개발을 통해 지속적인 영향력을 미치고자 열정적으로 노력하고 있습니다. 열정적인 전문가 팀으로서, 우리는 글로벌 시장의 끊임없이 변화하는 요구를 충족하기 위한 고급 칩 제품 및 솔루션 개발에 특화되어 있습니다. OLED 패널 응용 분야에 중점을 둔 저희는 데이터 주도형 통찰력과 전략적 마케팅을 활용하여 성공적인 전략을 구축합니다. 저희는 디스플레이 산업의 최전선에 머무르기 위해 Mini-LED 및 Micro-LED와 같은 신흥 기술을 탐색하는 것을 자랑스럽게 여깁니다. 저희의 협력적인 접근 방식은 고객과 손을 맞잡고 그들의 고한 요구 사항을 이해하고 맞춤형 솔루션을 제공합니다. 우리와 함께 기술의 미래를 함께 창조하고 가능성을 다시 정의하십시오.

Name: Helsinki Memory Technologies, Oy

HMT Oy was formed in March 2013 as an offshoot of an innovative collaboration agreement between Pendrell Corporation (NASDAQ: PCO) and Nokia Corporation.  The HMT team is continuing more than fifteen years of research and development into embedded MultiMediaCard (e•MMC), Secure Digital (SD), Universal Flash Storage (UFS) and other leading edge ManagedNAND storage interfaces and technologies.  To date, this research and development has generated more than 200 patents and patent applications, many of which have been declared standards essential.  A member of the HMT team is listed as an inventor in more than 150 patents and patent applications which form more than 40 patent families.

Helsinki Memory Technologies is a member of JEDEC (www.jedec.org), the global standards setting body for the microelectronics industry.  We are also a member of the SD Association (www.sdcard.org), the standards body defining SD memory card technologies, and an SDALA licensee.  Our extensive technical experience, in-depth information and resources, and up-to-date industry knowledge create an ideal foundation to provide our clients with targeted, high-value, and cost-effective technical consultation and services in the area of solid state storage technologies.

Learn more about us at www.helsinkimemorytech.com.

Based in Toronto, Crucial IP Inc. is a provider of silicon IP and design services to the Consumer Electronics and Broadcast industries. Founded by a team of veterans with over 60 years of combined experience in consumer video and computer graphics, Crucial IP is committed to providing high quality, cost effective IP cores for ASIC and FPGA implementation. With a focus on image quality and robust design, all cores have been subjected to hundreds of hours of rigorous testing.

As silicon densities continue to increase, competitive pressures dictate that companies incorporate more and more functionality into their designs, whether implemented in the ASIC or FPGA domain. Eventually, companies must reach beyond their core competencies into areas less familiar to them. The availability of IP cores for a wide of range of functions across the industry, showcases this fact. The use of 3rd party IP and design services allows companies to bring the required functionality to market in a low risk and cost effective manner.

Crucial’s silicon IP cores are available for licensing at the source code level providing customers with maximum flexibility and future-proofing. For customers with particular needs, Crucial IP can offer optional customization services in addition to the included technical support. As well as standard and customized IP products, full custom design services are also available. All of Crucial IP’s video cores are available for evaluation using off-the-shelf FPGA development kits and/or time limited IP trials.

Name: Shiima Electronics,Inc.
Description: We accept power cycle tests to evaluate thermal fatigue of power devices. ■ Short power cycle test (short cycle test) This is a test that repeats heat generation and cooling in a short time, such as a few seconds on and off for a few seconds. Due to the short cycle, heating and cooling are repeated only around the device (chip), and this test is mainly performed to evaluate wire bonding joints and metal connection materials under the device (chip). ■ Long power cycle test (Long cycle test) This test repeats heat generation and cooling over a long period of time, such as several minutes of energization ON and several minutes OFF. Allow sufficient heat generation time so that heat is transmitted to the Cu base plate, which is remote from the device (chip) that generates heat. Even when OFF, it takes a long time to wait until the heat that has spread throughout is cooled. The area of the joint near the Cu base plate is large, so the amount of linear expansion increases. For this reason, this test is mainly performed to evaluate the metal bonding material between the insulating substrate and the Cu base plate.

Name: University of Edinburgh After Hours Club (Electronics and Electrical Engineering)
Description:
Welcome to the After Hours Club! This page is a central place to get all the latest information and updates on what is happening in the club, including competitions and events. Previous and current projects will be showcased and we welcome any discussion or input from group members.

The club is part of the School of Engineering of The University of Edinburgh. The aim of the club is to make available electronics kit, labs, and (some!) expertise to students, so they can work on their own electronics projects.  The only rules are that it shall *not* involve University work, and the usual safety regulations must be obeyed. Core themes are electrical engineering, hobby electronics, embedded systems, microcontrollers.

The club gives students the chance to work on electronics projects of their own, in their own free time, out of their own free will. It is not a lab where they follow guidelines or work through a lab sheet. Some students already have a good idea of what they want to do, while others are still searching. We help in both cases, and encourage forming teams. However, our role is more like a "facilitator" rather than a "project manager", which means students push things forward themselves!

Name: Zink Technologies Ltd
Description:
Zink Technologies Ltd (Zinktech) is a new company formed to realise the potential of its patented technology, namely a low cost, reflective, bistable LCD display.

ZTL brings together a strong commercial team which is focussed on one thing – changing the way that we see information outside the home.

The technology was invented by a leading UK university. ZTL acquired the patent application and was successful in securing the main claims including:

•	Bistable LCD switching meaning that power is only required to change the image resulting in minimal energy usage
•	Single layer design meaning that the cost is lower and the product more flexible and robust
•	Reflective backplane so that the image looks like paper, needing simple illumination only at night
•	Simple construction, potentially compatible with roll-to-roll processing on plastic films

Transforming the world as we see it.

Name: Einslumenn inc.*
Description:
We are a young company with so much enthusiasm. Our matrix company is Bravermann, s.à.r.l.*.

It is the first time that Bravermann bressler gets involved in manufacturing process with a direct investment up to 500M CHF in Haifa, Israel. 

Our mentality is simple: the biggest computer and new technology companies are obssesed with investing and allocating resources in quantum computing and big AI. Let's be real, no one of us is going to have (nor need) a quantum computer or a deep learning project of Google (r). We need personal computers and laptops faster and better. And here we enter: in your laptop or computer all the information is driven by electrons in conductor materials (electricity). Electricity doesn't travel at the speed of light and the resistance of the conductor material produces heat when electrons move to drive information. 

Photonic chips are diferent, if they are in almost vacuum we use photons to transmit information trough the microprocessor to achieve real light speed (way faster than the better of the computers, true). And we have another benefit: no heating, no need of cooling systems...

We work in manufacturate a prototype by December 2018.

We have the manufacturing part, that most likely will be located in Haifa and in the same facilities or others, in example in Switzerland, the research facilities to make products every time better. 

It is true that some big companies are investing in photonic driven information but is residual if we compare how much they spend on quantum computers, we can say right now that quantum computing it is not a funding priority at all.

So, that's who we are. Young and ambitious, will you join us?

The team.

Name: zer0fault engineering solutions
Description:
At zer0fault we develop flexible field configurable ASICs for use in design verification, production test, product qualification, field application and customer return analysis of single ICs, circuit boards, as well as complex systems containing multiple components.

zer0fault was founded on the beliefs that flexible (engineering) test-solutions are becoming less and less affordable for small and mid-size companies and that there is an easy way to change this.

Previously commercial engineering test-systems were offered by a number of companies. These were fully integrated testers with soft- and hardware geared towards engineering purposes. With increased complexity and operating frequencies of the devices under test, these test-systems became more and more expensive to develop and produce and they subsequently disappeared from the market. Many companies now use production test-systems for engineering purposes, an approach with multiple disadvantages.

Seeing the need for dedicated engineering tester while at the same time understanding the high cost of developing a complete "universally" usable test-system, zer0fault is trying a different approach:
We develop highly configurable ASICs that contain functional blocks available in test-systems, but not in other commercially available ICs. Our ASIC can then be combined with other hardware to build a customized test-system (e.g. FPGA for test-pattern; our ICs for timing generation, CLK jitter injection, source-sync strobe, etc.).

Name: MYCROPORE CORPORATION LTD
Description:
Mycropore Corporation is a leading provider of micro-contamination control products and solutions serving the semiconductor and related micro-electronics industries.

Our products are used by leading fabs including TSMC Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company, Intel Corporation, UMC United Microelectronics Corporation, Samsung America, GlobalFoundries, Micron Technology, Korea S-xx Customer SEH Shin-Etsu Handotai Co., Ltd, SUMCO Corporation and AUO AU Optronics Corporation. In addition, Mycropore products has increasingly obtained design-wins at semiconductor slurry makers, chemical makers and equipment makers in Taiwan, USA and Europe.

The Company was started in Singapore in 2013 with a strong and experienced global team of filtration professionals. To serve and to provide for directly to major industry clients in Taiwan, Mycropore has made a strategic move in 2015 to have the team relocate both its R&D and operations from Singapore. The worldwide headquarter is established in the business district of Zhubei City of Hsinchu, Taiwan.

Mycropore operates a ISO 9000 certified and clean room of up to Class 100 Production Facility and R&D Technology Centre in Hsinchu Science Park, Taiwan.

Given Mycropore’s unique capability and experience, and Taiwan’s supply of skilled labor and complete supply-chain infrastructure for advanced technology manufacturing, the Company is poised for global expansion and growth going forward.

Description:
ULTI Crystal Technology is a leading manufacturer for finished crystal components and precision polarization optics for solid-state laser at extremely competitive prices in China. We hold on special and advance crystal diffusion bonded technology which enables the joining of different crystal material without the use of an adhesive or an organic or inorganic bonding aid. Composite crystal components using our advanced diffusion bonded technology will enable cost-effecitve systems of increased output power and improved beam quality.

ULTI Crystal's crystal products include laser crystals, nonlinear crystals, optical crystals, and diffusion bonding crystals modules assemblies for commercial laser systems, instrument systems, and diode pumped solid state (DPSS) laser module applications.

The company's precision polarization optics capabilities include waveplates and polarizers for your laser systems and telecom application. Our excellent engineers team are dedicated to develop unique technologies to produce high power seriers to meet increasing marketing requirement.

Our production capability includes crystal growth, prototyping, cutting, drilling, grinding, polishing (technical/commercial and optical), coating, and testing. The product forms available offered include ingots, blanks, slabs, rods, prisms, lenses, windows, substrates, cylinders, tubes, pyramids, cones, mirrors and custom forms.

ULTI Crystal consistently searches for better solution to optimize productivity, efficiency and product performance. Our internal Quality Management System and advanced ERP system have helped ULTI Crystal to gain the ISO 9001:2000 Certification.

Name: TMX Scientific
Description:
TMX Scientific provides thermoreflectance-based systems and advanced software programs to propel innovation, shorten design cycle time, and troubleshoot thermal challenges in the microelectronics industry.   Our services and measurement systems are ideal for measuring surface temperature fields with submicron resolution, determining material thermal properties of thin-film layers, and characterizing heat conduction in complex 3D devices. 

The TMX Scientific product suite includes T°Imager, a submicron thermoreflectance CCD microscopy system; Transometer, the first commercially available thermoreflectance-based metrology system that measures material thermal properties of thin-film layers; T°Pixel, an application that enables pixel-perfect temperature differential maps and statistics-driven filtering; and T°Solver, a patented, ultra-fast, self-adaptive computational software application that computes the heat distribution of complex microelectronics devices in 3D.

The accuracy of our high resolution submicron measurement coupled with the speed of our patented computational simulation engine makes our solution uniquely powerful compared to what is currently available on the market.  By measuring surface temperatures of submicron components and predicting internal temperature distributions, TMX Scientific's technology does for microelectronic component design what X-ray and MRI did for medical diagnosis.

Name: Lightning Circuits Inc.
Description: Lightning Circuits is Canada's leading manufacturer of single- sided circuit board products. With 40 years of specialization in the very economical print and etch technology. Lightning has a reputation for quality manufacturing, reliable delivery and dependable service. Dedicating its business solely to this type of product has resulted in a highly focused approach to the unique characteristics for low cost circuit board manufacture, allowing Lightning to compete on a worldwide basis. Working routinely in the automotive, telecommunications, consumer products and industrial control market sectors, Lightning provides comprehensive customer support, effective response on design changes, custom-tailored processing and Just-In-Time capability. Formal quality management programs supported by in process quality control have long been a cornerstone of the operation. Manufacturing to full UL approvals, processes are controlled utilizing SPC and ISO9002 procedures. Very skilled personnel and up-to-date, highly productive manufacturing facilities assure conformance to specified design parameters ensuring competitive solutions to many technical circuit problems. Lightning's circuits are currently being used in new automobiles (by both North American and Japanese vehicle manufacturers), domestic and business telephones and in a wide variety of consumer appliance products ranging from smoke and security alarms to kitchen appliances and energy conservation devices. Approximately 30% of Lightning's sales are currently exported to the United States with a further 5% going to Mexico and Europe (U.K., France, Ireland). Utilization of a network of commissioned sales representatives in the United States has proven to be very successful in capturing and servicing this rapidly growing segment of the company's sales. Lighting Circuits has a full range of single-sided capability including: - Prototype to high volume processing - High volume punching, drilling, routing and scoring - Tool and die design and procurement - Conductive ink screening.

Description:
浙江尚能实业股份有限公司（原浙江尚能电子材料有限公司），创建于2009年8月，是一家致力于高端电子化学品生产的国家高新技术企业，专业生产适用于大、中规模集成电路、半导体分立器件、晶体硅太阳能、TFT-LCD制造、LED等工艺制造过程中专用的超净高纯化学试剂，产品畅销国内外，覆盖中国20多个省、直辖市，远销东南亚等地区，主要产品包括：电子级、UP级及以上级别的硝酸、盐酸、硫酸、氢氟酸、氢氧化钾、氢氧化钠、各类蚀刻液、显影液、漂洗液、异丙醇、无水乙醇等，其中高端产品完全替代国外进口。
         公司奉行“精品开拓市场，人品开创事业”的企业宗旨，秉承“笃守信誉，追求卓越”的企业精神，实行“科技创新、质量永恒、行业领先、客户满意”的质量方针，与客户携手共进、开拓未来，着力于建设电子化学品行业的品牌性企业。

Name: 深圳市正耀科技有限公司
江西誉鸿锦电子技术有限公司
Description:
江西誉鸿锦第三代半导体芯片全产业链项目由深圳誉鸿锦芯科技合伙企业（有限合伙）投资，主要从事高品质氮化镓（GaN）电子材料和高端光电材料的MOCVD外延生长及器件流片、模组的研发和生产制造。项目总投资50亿元，建成后将形成每月产能10万片，对应约5亿颗芯片，年产值100亿人民币规模。江西誉鸿锦技术团队成员十余年来专注于GaN电子器件，如射频/功率肖特基二极管（SBD）、高电子迁移率晶体管（HEMT）的研发，拥有丰富的工艺经验，掌握了氮化镓外延、器件制备和封装等领域的核心技术，达到世界先进水平。同时，在UVC-LED和GaN蓝绿激光器的研发和生产上，公司引进日本大阳日酸株式会社MOCVD设备，由两位诺奖得主顾问（天野浩和中村修二教授）、20余位中科院及日本著名企业研究机构著名专家和具有30余年材料及器件经验的团队提供技术支持。誉鸿锦已具备4/6/8寸氮化镓电子材料的外延生产及器件流片能力。
江西誉鸿锦芯片科技有限公司将致力于实现氮化镓电子器件和高端光电器件等领域的“中国智造”！

Name: EASYFUN ELECTRONICS LIMITED
Description:
Easy Fun Electronics Limited is a worldwide independent electronic component distributor specializing in electronic component shortages. Easy Fun has established partnerships with OEMs and brokers around the world by offering perfect customer service, competitive pricing for our on-hand inventory and global availabilities, as well as particular value added services.

Easy Fun is one of the biggest professional suppliers with good reputation in the global ICs exchange. Easy Fun has built up a world-wide network of contacts and has direct links to semiconductor manufacturers. We continue our original policy of not limiting our catalog to one or two lines. We have the unique ability to meet an entire range of client requirements on all lines. 

Our purchasing team works around the clock to understand your needs, the market, and the commodities to bring you one of the largest inventories of semiconductors and passive components via our consigned inventory and our exclusive stock of commodity product. Also, we try never to lose sight of the fact that there is, and always will be, a demand for "obsolete" components.

We, EasyFun, like to think of ourselves as your reliable business partner. We work hard to understand your needs and are constantly looking for ways we can better meet your requirements. We would like to be your sole supplier, but we are just as eager and work just as hard to fill the missing links that your other vendors create in your supply chain.

Easy Fun aims to seek perfect quality, best service and competitive price. We will cooperate with all-friends to create a splendid future.
